Test 17: 3D AABB Bin Packing (C#) Score: 1.00 / 8
Typical Prompt:
You are solving a 3D Bin Packing problem with axis-aligned boxes in C#.

Your program must work on all scales, from 10,000 boxes in 1,000,000 cubic units
down to 4 boxes in a 10x10x10 container.

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: N W H D (number of boxes, container width, height, depth)
Next N lines: w h d (box dimensions)

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: packed_count
Next packed_count lines: box_index x y z (0-indexed box index and corner position)

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on container size and number of boxes
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 30 seconds even for very large containers
3. **Quality**: Maximize number of boxes packed while ensuring valid placements

**Constraints:**
- Boxes must be entirely within container bounds
- No two boxes may overlap
- Boxes are axis-aligned (no arbitrary rotation, but you may reorder w/h/d)
- Maximize number of boxes packed

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a static void Main method.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Pack a collection of rectangular boxes into a shipping container, fitting as much total volume in as possible. Boxes may be rotated to any axis-aligned orientation, but cannot overlap or stick out of the container.

This 3D packing problem is NP-hard. Subpasses increase the number and variety of box sizes. The baseline uses a greedy first-fit approach.

 1.0000
[4 boxes in 10x10x10] Packed: 4/4, Baseline: 4, Time: 0.1s - excellent (≥ baseline)

3D AABB Packing - 4 boxes in 10x10x10

View Code (17689 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;

public static class Program
{
    private static readonly int[][] Permutations =
    {
        new[] { 0, 1, 2 },
        new[] { 0, 2, 1 },
        new[] { 1, 0, 2 },
        new[] { 1, 2, 0 },
        new[] { 2, 0, 1 },
        new[] { 2, 1, 0 },
    };

    private struct Box
    {
        public int Index;
        public long A;
        public long B;
        public long C;
        public long S0;
        public long S1;
        public long S2;
        public long Volume;
    }

    private struct Space
    {
        public long X;
        public long Y;
        public long Z;
        public long W;
        public long H;
        public long D;
        public long S0;
        public long S1;
        public long S2;
        public long Volume;
    }

    private struct Placement
    {
        public int Index;
        public long X;
        public long Y;
        public long Z;
    }

    private struct PackResult
    {
        public Placement[] Placements;
        public int Count;
        public long VolumeSum;
    }

    private sealed class BoxOrderComparer : IComparer<int>
    {
        private readonly Box[] _boxes;
        private readonly int _mode;

        public BoxOrderComparer(Box[] boxes, int mode)
        {
            _boxes = boxes;
            _mode = mode;
        }

        public int Compare(int i, int j)
        {
            Box a = _boxes[i];
            Box b = _boxes[j];

            switch (_mode)
            {
                case 0:
                    // Small volume first.
                    return CompareThen(a.Volume, b.Volume,
                        a.S0, b.S0,
                        a.S2, b.S2,
                        i, j);
                case 1:
                    // Hard thin boxes first.
                    return CompareThen(a.S0, b.S0,
                        a.Volume, b.Volume,
                        a.S2, b.S2,
                        i, j);
                case 2:
                    // Long boxes first.
                    return CompareThenDesc(a.S2, b.S2,
                        a.Volume, b.Volume,
                        a.S0, b.S0,
                        i, j);
                default:
                    // Large volume first.
                    return CompareThenDesc(a.Volume, b.Volume,
                        b.S2, a.S2,
                        a.S0, b.S0,
                        i, j);
            }
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream _stream;
        private readonly byte[] _buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
        private int _len;
        private int _ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            _stream = stream;
        }

        private int ReadByte()
        {
            if (_ptr >= _len)
            {
                _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
                _ptr = 0;
                if (_len <= 0)
                {
                    return -1;
                }
            }

            return _buffer[_ptr++];
        }

        public long NextLong()
        {
            int c;
            do
            {
                c = ReadByte();
            }
            while (c <= 32 && c >= 0);

            long sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = ReadByte();
            }

            long value = 0;
            while (c > 32)
            {
                value = value * 10 + (c - '0');
                c = ReadByte();
            }

            return value * sign;
        }
    }

    public static void Main()
    {
        FastScanner fs = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        int n = (int)fs.NextLong();
        long containerW = fs.NextLong();
        long containerH = fs.NextLong();
        long containerD = fs.NextLong();

        Box[] boxes = new Box[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            long a = fs.NextLong();
            long b = fs.NextLong();
            long c = fs.NextLong();
            boxes[i] = MakeBox(i, a, b, c);
        }

        int[] modes;
        if (n <= 200)
        {
            modes = new[] { 0, 1, 2, 3 };
        }
        else if (n <= 3000)
        {
            modes = new[] { 0, 1, 2 };
        }
        else
        {
            modes = new[] { 0, 2 };
        }

        PackResult best = default;
        bool haveBest = false;

        foreach (int mode in modes)
        {
            int[] order = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                order[i] = i;
            }

            Array.Sort(order, new BoxOrderComparer(boxes, mode));
            PackResult result = Pack(boxes, order, containerW, containerH, containerD);

            if (!haveBest ||
                result.Count > best.Count ||
                (result.Count == best.Count && result.VolumeSum > best.VolumeSum))
            {
                best = result;
                haveBest = true;
            }

            if (haveBest && best.Count == n)
            {
                break;
            }
        }

        StringBuilder output = new StringBuilder();
        output.AppendLine(best.Count.ToString());
        for (int i = 0; i < best.Count; i++)
        {
            Placement p = best.Placements[i];
            output.Append(p.Index).Append(' ')
                .Append(p.X).Append(' ')
                .Append(p.Y).Append(' ')
                .Append(p.Z).AppendLine();
        }

        Console.Write(output.ToString());
    }

    private static PackResult Pack(Box[] boxes, int[] order, long containerW, long containerH, long containerD)
    {
        int n = boxes.Length;
        Space[] free = new Space[n * 3 + 5];
        int freeCount = 1;
        free[0] = MakeSpace(0, 0, 0, containerW, containerH, containerD);

        Placement[] placements = new Placement[n];
        int packedCount = 0;
        long packedVolume = 0;

        for (int oi = 0; oi < n; oi++)
        {
            Box box = boxes[order[oi]];

            int bestSpaceIndex = -1;
            long bestSlack0 = 0;
            long bestSlack1 = 0;
            long bestSlack2 = 0;
            long bestSpaceVolume = 0;
            long bestSpaceX = 0;
            long bestSpaceY = 0;
            long bestSpaceZ = 0;

            for (int si = 0; si < freeCount; si++)
            {
                Space sp = free[si];
                if (box.S0 > sp.S0 || box.S1 > sp.S1 || box.S2 > sp.S2)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                long slack0 = sp.S0 - box.S0;
                long slack1 = sp.S1 - box.S1;
                long slack2 = sp.S2 - box.S2;

                if (BetterSpaceCandidate(slack0, slack1, slack2, sp,
                    bestSpaceIndex, bestSlack0, bestSlack1, bestSlack2,
                    bestSpaceVolume, bestSpaceX, bestSpaceY, bestSpaceZ))
                {
                    bestSpaceIndex = si;
                    bestSlack0 = slack0;
                    bestSlack1 = slack1;
                    bestSlack2 = slack2;
                    bestSpaceVolume = sp.Volume;
                    bestSpaceX = sp.X;
                    bestSpaceY = sp.Y;
                    bestSpaceZ = sp.Z;
                }

                if (slack0 == 0 && slack1 == 0 && slack2 == 0)
                {
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (bestSpaceIndex < 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            Space chosenSpace = free[bestSpaceIndex];

            long bestV0 = -1;
            long bestV1 = -1;
            long bestV2 = -1;
            int bestBoxPerm = -1;
            int bestSplitPerm = -1;
            int bestNonZero = -1;
            long bestBw0 = 0;
            long bestBw1 = 0;
            long bestBw2 = 0;

            for (int bp = 0; bp < 6; bp++)
            {
                GetBoxPermutation(box, bp, out long bw0, out long bw1, out long bw2);
                if (bw0 > chosenSpace.W || bw1 > chosenSpace.H || bw2 > chosenSpace.D)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                for (int sp = 0; sp < 6; sp++)
                {
                    int a0 = Permutations[sp][0];
                    int a1 = Permutations[sp][1];
                    int a2 = Permutations[sp][2];

                    long s0 = GetSpaceAxis(chosenSpace, a0);
                    long s1 = GetSpaceAxis(chosenSpace, a1);
                    long s2 = GetSpaceAxis(chosenSpace, a2);
                    long b0 = GetBoxAxis(bw0, bw1, bw2, a0);
                    long b1 = GetBoxAxis(bw0, bw1, bw2, a1);
                    long b2 = GetBoxAxis(bw0, bw1, bw2, a2);

                    long rem0 = s0 - b0;
                    long rem1 = s1 - b1;
                    long rem2 = s2 - b2;

                    long v0 = rem0 * s1 * s2;
                    long v1 = b0 * rem1 * s2;
                    long v2 = b0 * b1 * rem2;
                    int nonZero = (v0 > 0 ? 1 : 0) + (v1 > 0 ? 1 : 0) + (v2 > 0 ? 1 : 0);

                    if (BetterCombo(v0, v1, v2, nonZero, bestV0, bestV1, bestV2, bestNonZero))
                    {
                        bestV0 = v0;
                        bestV1 = v1;
                        bestV2 = v2;
                        bestBoxPerm = bp;
                        bestSplitPerm = sp;
                        bestNonZero = nonZero;
                        bestBw0 = bw0;
                        bestBw1 = bw1;
                        bestBw2 = bw2;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (bestBoxPerm < 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            // Remove the chosen free space only after the placement is confirmed.
            free[bestSpaceIndex] = free[--freeCount];

            placements[packedCount++] = new Placement
            {
                Index = box.Index,
                X = chosenSpace.X,
                Y = chosenSpace.Y,
                Z = chosenSpace.Z
            };
            packedVolume += box.Volume;

            int o0 = Permutations[bestSplitPerm][0];
            int o1 = Permutations[bestSplitPerm][1];
            int o2 = Permutations[bestSplitPerm][2];
            AddChildren(ref free, ref freeCount, chosenSpace, bestBw0, bestBw1, bestBw2, o0, o1, o2);
        }

        return new PackResult
        {
            Placements = placements,
            Count = packedCount,
            VolumeSum = packedVolume
        };
    }

    private static void AddChildren(ref Space[] free, ref int freeCount, Space sp, long bw0, long bw1, long bw2, int o0, int o1, int o2)
    {
        long s0 = GetSpaceAxis(sp, o0);
        long s1 = GetSpaceAxis(sp, o1);
        long s2 = GetSpaceAxis(sp, o2);

        long b0 = GetBoxAxis(bw0, bw1, bw2, o0);
        long b1 = GetBoxAxis(bw0, bw1, bw2, o1);
        long b2 = GetBoxAxis(bw0, bw1, bw2, o2);

        // Child 0: remainder on the first split axis.
        long r0 = s0 - b0;
        if (r0 > 0)
        {
            long x = sp.X;
            long y = sp.Y;
            long z = sp.Z;
            long w = sp.W;
            long h = sp.H;
            long d = sp.D;

            AddAxis(ref x, ref y, ref z, o0, b0);
            SetAxis(ref w, ref h, ref d, o0, r0);
            free[freeCount++] = MakeSpace(x, y, z, w, h, d);
        }

        // Child 1: remainder on the second split axis.
        long r1 = s1 - b1;
        if (r1 > 0)
        {
            long x = sp.X;
            long y = sp.Y;
            long z = sp.Z;
            long w = sp.W;
            long h = sp.H;
            long d = sp.D;

            AddAxis(ref x, ref y, ref z, o0, b0);
            AddAxis(ref x, ref y, ref z, o1, b1);
            SetAxis(ref w, ref h, ref d, o0, b0);
            SetAxis(ref w, ref h, ref d, o1, r1);
            free[freeCount++] = MakeSpace(x, y, z, w, h, d);
        }

        // Child 2: remainder on the third split axis.
        long r2 = s2 - b2;
        if (r2 > 0)
        {
            long x = sp.X;
            long y = sp.Y;
            long z = sp.Z;
            long w = sp.W;
            long h = sp.H;
            long d = sp.D;

            AddAxis(ref x, ref y, ref z, o0, b0);
            AddAxis(ref x, ref y, ref z, o1, b1);
            AddAxis(ref x, ref y, ref z, o2, b2);
            SetAxis(ref w, ref h, ref d, o0, b0);
            SetAxis(ref w, ref h, ref d, o1, b1);
            SetAxis(ref w, ref h, ref d, o2, r2);
            free[freeCount++] = MakeSpace(x, y, z, w, h, d);
        }
    }

    private static Box MakeBox(int index, long a, long b, long c)
    {
        long s0 = a;
        long s1 = b;
        long s2 = c;
        if (s0 > s1) Swap(ref s0, ref s1);
        if (s1 > s2) Swap(ref s1, ref s2);
        if (s0 > s1) Swap(ref s0, ref s1);

        return new Box
        {
            Index = index,
            A = a,
            B = b,
            C = c,
            S0 = s0,
            S1 = s1,
            S2 = s2,
            Volume = a * b * c
        };
    }

    private static Space MakeSpace(long x, long y, long z, long w, long h, long d)
    {
        long s0 = w;
        long s1 = h;
        long s2 = d;
        if (s0 > s1) Swap(ref s0, ref s1);
        if (s1 > s2) Swap(ref s1, ref s2);
        if (s0 > s1) Swap(ref s0, ref s1);

        return new Space
        {
            X = x,
            Y = y,
            Z = z,
            W = w,
            H = h,
            D = d,
            S0 = s0,
            S1 = s1,
            S2 = s2,
            Volume = w * h * d
        };
    }

    private static void GetBoxPermutation(Box box, int perm, out long x, out long y, out long z)
    {
        switch (perm)
        {
            case 0:
                x = box.A; y = box.B; z = box.C;
                return;
            case 1:
                x = box.A; y = box.C; z = box.B;
                return;
            case 2:
                x = box.B; y = box.A; z = box.C;
                return;
            case 3:
                x = box.B; y = box.C; z = box.A;
                return;
            case 4:
                x = box.C; y = box.A; z = box.B;
                return;
            default:
                x = box.C; y = box.B; z = box.A;
                return;
        }
    }

    private static long GetSpaceAxis(Space sp, int axis)
    {
        return axis == 0 ? sp.W : axis == 1 ? sp.H : sp.D;
    }

    private static long GetBoxAxis(long x, long y, long z, int axis)
    {
        return axis == 0 ? x : axis == 1 ? y : z;
    }

    private static void AddAxis(ref long x, ref long y, ref long z, int axis, long delta)
    {
        if (axis == 0)
        {
            x += delta;
        }
        else if (axis == 1)
        {
            y += delta;
        }
        else
        {
            z += delta;
        }
    }

    private static void SetAxis(ref long x, ref long y, ref long z, int axis, long value)
    {
        if (axis == 0)
        {
            x = value;
        }
        else if (axis == 1)
        {
            y = value;
        }
        else
        {
            z = value;
        }
    }

    private static bool BetterCombo(long v0, long v1, long v2, int nonZero, long bestV0, long bestV1, long bestV2, int bestNonZero)
    {
        if (bestNonZero < 0)
        {
            return true;
        }

        if (v0 != bestV0)
        {
            return v0 > bestV0;
        }

        if (v1 != bestV1)
        {
            return v1 > bestV1;
        }

        if (v2 != bestV2)
        {
            return v2 > bestV2;
        }

        return nonZero > bestNonZero;
    }

    private static bool BetterSpaceCandidate(long slack0, long slack1, long slack2, Space sp,
        int bestSpaceIndex, long bestSlack0, long bestSlack1, long bestSlack2,
        long bestSpaceVolume, long bestSpaceX, long bestSpaceY, long bestSpaceZ)
    {
        if (bestSpaceIndex < 0)
        {
            return true;
        }

        if (slack0 != bestSlack0)
        {
            return slack0 < bestSlack0;
        }

        if (slack1 != bestSlack1)
        {
            return slack1 < bestSlack1;
        }

        if (slack2 != bestSlack2)
        {
            return slack2 < bestSlack2;
        }

        if (sp.Volume != bestSpaceVolume)
        {
            return sp.Volume < bestSpaceVolume;
        }

        if (sp.X != bestSpaceX)
        {
            return sp.X < bestSpaceX;
        }

        if (sp.Y != bestSpaceY)
        {
            return sp.Y < bestSpaceY;
        }

        return sp.Z < bestSpaceZ;
    }

    private static int CompareThen(long a0, long b0, long a1, long b1, long a2, long b2, int i, int j)
    {
        int c = CompareLong(a0, b0);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        c = CompareLong(a1, b1);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        c = CompareLong(a2, b2);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        return i.CompareTo(j);
    }

    private static int CompareThenDesc(long a0, long b0, long a1, long b1, long a2, long b2, int i, int j)
    {
        int c = CompareLong(b0, a0);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        c = CompareLong(a1, b1);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        c = CompareLong(a2, b2);
        if (c != 0) return c;
        return i.CompareTo(j);
    }

    private static int CompareLong(long a, long b)
    {
        if (a < b) return -1;
        if (a > b) return 1;
        return 0;
    }

    private static void Swap(ref long a, ref long b)
    {
        long t = a;
        a = b;
        b = t;
    }
}

Test 18: Minimum Cut Problem (C++) Score: 3.00 / 9
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a C++ program to solve the Minimum Edge Cut problem.

**Target environment specs**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler information**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

You must write a C++ solver that can handle ANY graph size from trivial to multi-gb.

**The Challenge:**
Your C++ program will be tested with graphs ranging from small toy examples to massive real-world networks.
The same program must work efficiently across ALL scales.

**Problem:**
Given an undirected connected graph, find the minimum number of edges to remove
such that the graph becomes disconnected (split into two non-empty components).

**Input format (stdin):**
- Line 1: N M (number of nodes, number of edges)
- Lines 2 to M+1: u v (undirected edge between nodes u and v, 0-indexed)

**Output format (stdout):**
- Line 1: K (number of edges in the minimum cut)
- Lines 2 to K+1: u v (each edge in the cut, in any order)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with this compiler, and run on this environment.
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle graphs even if they don't fit in memory.
4. Complete as fast as possible.
5. Output must be a valid cut that disconnects the graph
6. Minimize the number of cut edges
7. Must handle varying graph sizes efficiently

**Example:**
Input:
```
4 5
0 1
1 2
2 3
3 0
0 2
```

Output (one possible answer):
```
2
0 1
3 0
```

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different algorithms based on graph scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Find the smallest set of edges to remove from a graph so that it splits into two disconnected pieces. Think of it like finding the weakest point in a network — the fewest cables you’d need to cut to divide it in two.

Subpasses increase the graph size from small networks to very large ones. The AI must implement an efficient algorithm; naïve approaches are far too slow on the bigger inputs.

 1.0000
[6 nodes, 10 edges, min cut ~2] Cut size: 1, Known min: 2, Time: 0.08s - optimal

Subpass 0: 6 nodes, 10 edges, min cut ~2

Score: 1.00

Details: [6 nodes, 10 edges, min cut ~2] Cut size: 1, Known min: 2, Time: 0.08s - optimal

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <chrono>
#include <cmath>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <memory>
#include <numeric>
#include <random>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct Edge {
    int u;
    int v;
};

struct TreeNode {
    int left;
    int right;
    int leaf;
    int size;
};

struct SolverContext {
    int original_n = 0;
    vector<TreeNode> nodes;

    explicit SolverContext(int n = 0) : original_n(n) {
        nodes.reserve((size_t)max<long long>(2LL * n + 16, 32LL));
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            nodes.push_back(TreeNode{-1, -1, i, 1});
        }
    }

    int merge_nodes(int a, int b) {
        int id = (int)nodes.size();
        nodes.push_back(TreeNode{a, b, -1, nodes[a].size + nodes[b].size});
        return id;
    }

    void mark_root(int root, vector<char>& mask) const {
        if (root < 0) return;
        vector<int> st;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int x = st.back();
            st.pop_back();
            const TreeNode& nd = nodes[x];
            if (nd.left == -1) {
                mask[nd.leaf] = 1;
            } else {
                st.push_back(nd.left);
                st.push_back(nd.right);
            }
        }
    }

    void mark_roots(const vector<int>& roots, vector<char>& mask) const {
        for (int r : roots) mark_root(r, mask);
    }
};

struct GraphState {
    int n = 0;
    shared_ptr<vector<Edge>> edges;
    vector<int> rep;
};

struct InternalCut {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<int> roots;
};

struct Candidate {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<char> mask;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;
    vector<int> root_node;
    int comps = 0;

    DSU(int n, const vector<int>& rep) : parent(n), sz(n, 1), root_node(rep), comps(n) {
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        int r = x;
        while (parent[r] != r) r = parent[r];
        while (parent[x] != x) {
            int p = parent[x];
            parent[x] = r;
            x = p;
        }
        return r;
    }

    int unite(int a, int b, SolverContext& ctx) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return a;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
        root_node[a] = ctx.merge_nodes(root_node[a], root_node[b]);
        --comps;
        return a;
    }
};

static int find_bridge(
    int n,
    const vector<int>& head,
    const vector<int>& to,
    const vector<int>& nxt,
    const vector<int>& arc_eid
) {
    vector<int> tin(n, -1), low(n, 0), parent(n, -1), parent_edge(n, -1), it = head;
    int timer = 0;
    vector<int> st;
    st.reserve(n);

    for (int root = 0; root < n; ++root) {
        if (tin[root] != -1) continue;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int v = st.back();
            if (tin[v] == -1) tin[v] = low[v] = timer++;

            bool descended = false;
            while (it[v] != -1) {
                int arc = it[v];
                it[v] = nxt[arc];
                int u = to[arc];
                if (arc_eid[arc] == parent_edge[v]) continue;
                if (tin[u] == -1) {
                    parent[u] = v;
                    parent_edge[u] = arc_eid[arc];
                    st.push_back(u);
                    descended = true;
                    break;
                }
                low[v] = min(low[v], tin[u]);
            }

            if (descended) continue;

            st.pop_back();
            int p = parent[v];
            if (p != -1) {
                low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                if (low[v] > tin[p]) return parent_edge[v];
            }
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

static GraphState make_base_graph(int n, const shared_ptr<vector<Edge>>& edges) {
    GraphState g;
    g.n = n;
    g.edges = edges;
    g.rep.resize(n);
    iota(g.rep.begin(), g.rep.end(), 0);
    return g;
}

static GraphState contract_to(const GraphState& g, int target, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    target = max(1, min(target, g.n));
    if (target == g.n) return g;

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    DSU dsu(g.n, g.rep);

    while (dsu.comps > target) {
        const Edge& e = edges[(size_t)(rng() % edges.size())];
        int a = dsu.find(e.u);
        int b = dsu.find(e.v);
        if (a == b) continue;
        dsu.unite(a, b, ctx);
    }

    vector<int> root_to_new(g.n, -1);
    vector<int> new_rep;
    new_rep.reserve((size_t)dsu.comps);

    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        int r = dsu.find(v);
        if (root_to_new[r] == -1) {
            root_to_new[r] = (int)new_rep.size();
            new_rep.push_back(dsu.root_node[r]);
        }
    }

    vector<Edge> new_edges;
    new_edges.reserve(edges.size());
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        int a = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.u)];
        int b = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.v)];
        if (a != b) new_edges.push_back(Edge{a, b});
    }

    GraphState h;
    h.n = (int)new_rep.size();
    h.edges = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(new_edges));
    h.rep = std::move(new_rep);
    return h;
}

static InternalCut exact_stoer_wagner(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx) {
    InternalCut result;
    int n = g.n;
    if (n <= 1) {
        result.value = 0;
        if (n == 1) result.roots = {g.rep[0]};
        return result;
    }

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    vector<long long> w((size_t)n * (size_t)n, 0);
    auto W = [&](int a, int b) -> long long& {
        return w[(size_t)a * (size_t)n + (size_t)b];
    };

    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        ++W(e.u, e.v);
        ++W(e.v, e.u);
    }

    vector<int> active(n);
    iota(active.begin(), active.end(), 0);
    vector<int> pos(n);
    iota(pos.begin(), pos.end(), 0);
    vector<int> comp_root = g.rep;
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    vector<char> added(n, 0);

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    int best_root = g.rep[0];

    while (active.size() > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (size_t iter = 0; iter < active.size(); ++iter) {
            int sel = -1;
            long long mx = -1;
            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v] && weight[v] > mx) {
                    mx = weight[v];
                    sel = v;
                }
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            prev = last;
            last = sel;

            if (iter + 1 == active.size()) {
                if (weight[sel] < best) {
                    best = weight[sel];
                    best_root = comp_root[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (int v : active) {
                        if (v == prev || v == sel) continue;
                        W(prev, v) += W(sel, v);
                        W(v, prev) = W(prev, v);
                    }
                    comp_root[prev] = ctx.merge_nodes(comp_root[prev], comp_root[sel]);
                    int idx = pos[sel];
                    int back = active.back();
                    active[idx] = back;
                    pos[back] = idx;
                    active.pop_back();
                }
                break;
            }

            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v]) weight[v] += W(sel, v);
            }
        }
    }

    result.value = best;
    result.roots = {best_root};
    return result;
}

static InternalCut solve_karger_stein(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    static constexpr int BASE_N = 40;
    if (g.n <= BASE_N) return exact_stoer_wagner(g, ctx);

    int target = max(2, (int)ceil((double)g.n / sqrt(2.0)));
    GraphState contracted = contract_to(g, target, ctx, rng);

    InternalCut a = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut b = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    if (a.value <= b.value) return a;
    return b;
}

static Candidate materialize_candidate(const InternalCut& cut, const SolverContext& ctx, int n) {
    Candidate cand;
    cand.value = cut.value;
    cand.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    ctx.mark_roots(cut.roots, cand.mask);
    return cand;
}

static Candidate run_quick_trial(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    GraphState h = contract_to(base, 2, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut cut;
    cut.value = (long long)h.edges->size();
    int root_a = h.rep[0];
    int root_b = h.rep[1];
    int chosen = (ctx.nodes[root_a].size <= ctx.nodes[root_b].size) ? root_a : root_b;
    cut.roots = {chosen};
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static Candidate run_full_attempt(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    InternalCut cut = solve_karger_stein(base, ctx, rng);
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static long long count_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    long long cnt = 0;
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            ++cnt;
        }
    }
    return cnt;
}

static void print_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
        }
    }
}

static int choose_attempts(int n, size_t edge_count, long long best_value) {
    int attempts = 8;
    if (edge_count <= 200000) attempts = 24;
    else if (edge_count <= 1000000) attempts = 16;
    else attempts = 12;

    if (best_value <= 4) attempts = max(attempts, 32);
    else if (best_value <= 8) attempts = max(attempts, 24);
    else if (best_value <= 16) attempts = max(attempts, 20);

    if (n > 500000) attempts = min(attempts, 8);
    else if (n > 100000) attempts = min(attempts, 12);
    return attempts;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n;
    long long m_input;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m_input)) return 0;

    vector<Edge> original_edges;
    original_edges.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, m_input));

    vector<long long> degree(n, 0);
    vector<int> head(n, -1), to, nxt, arc_eid;
    to.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    nxt.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    arc_eid.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));

    auto add_arc = [&](int u, int v, int id) {
        to.push_back(v);
        nxt.push_back(head[u]);
        arc_eid.push_back(id);
        head[u] = (int)to.size() - 1;
    };

    for (long long i = 0; i < m_input; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u == v) continue;
        int id = (int)original_edges.size();
        original_edges.push_back(Edge{u, v});
        ++degree[u];
        ++degree[v];
        add_arc(u, v, id);
        add_arc(v, u, id);
    }

    int m = (int)original_edges.size();
    if (n <= 1 || m == 0) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int bridge_id = find_bridge(n, head, to, nxt, arc_eid);
    if (bridge_id != -1) {
        cout << 1 << '\n';
        cout << original_edges[bridge_id].u << ' ' << original_edges[bridge_id].v << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int vmin = 0;
    long long delta = degree[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < delta) {
            delta = degree[i];
            vmin = i;
        }
    }

    auto original_ptr = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(original_edges));

    vector<long long>().swap(degree);
    vector<int>().swap(head);
    vector<int>().swap(to);
    vector<int>().swap(nxt);
    vector<int>().swap(arc_eid);

    GraphState base = make_base_graph(n, original_ptr);
    if (n <= 800) {
        SolverContext ctx(n);
        InternalCut cut = exact_stoer_wagner(base, ctx);
        Candidate cand = materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
        long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        cout << actual_count << '\n';
        print_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        return 0;
    }

    Candidate best;
    best.value = delta;
    best.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    best.mask[vmin] = 1;

    mt19937_64 rng;
    {
        uint64_t seed = (uint64_t)chrono::high_resolution_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)random_device{}();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)(uintptr_t)&seed;
        rng.seed(seed);
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_quick_trial(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    int attempts = choose_attempts(n, original_ptr->size(), best.value);
    for (int i = 0; i < attempts; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_full_attempt(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    cout << actual_count << '\n';
    print_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    return 0;
}
Subpass 1
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Subpass 1: 100 nodes, 400 edges, min cut ~6

Score: 1.00

Details: [100 nodes, 400 edges, min cut ~6] Cut size: 2, Known min: 6, Time: 0.01s - optimal

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <chrono>
#include <cmath>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <memory>
#include <numeric>
#include <random>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct Edge {
    int u;
    int v;
};

struct TreeNode {
    int left;
    int right;
    int leaf;
    int size;
};

struct SolverContext {
    int original_n = 0;
    vector<TreeNode> nodes;

    explicit SolverContext(int n = 0) : original_n(n) {
        nodes.reserve((size_t)max<long long>(2LL * n + 16, 32LL));
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            nodes.push_back(TreeNode{-1, -1, i, 1});
        }
    }

    int merge_nodes(int a, int b) {
        int id = (int)nodes.size();
        nodes.push_back(TreeNode{a, b, -1, nodes[a].size + nodes[b].size});
        return id;
    }

    void mark_root(int root, vector<char>& mask) const {
        if (root < 0) return;
        vector<int> st;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int x = st.back();
            st.pop_back();
            const TreeNode& nd = nodes[x];
            if (nd.left == -1) {
                mask[nd.leaf] = 1;
            } else {
                st.push_back(nd.left);
                st.push_back(nd.right);
            }
        }
    }

    void mark_roots(const vector<int>& roots, vector<char>& mask) const {
        for (int r : roots) mark_root(r, mask);
    }
};

struct GraphState {
    int n = 0;
    shared_ptr<vector<Edge>> edges;
    vector<int> rep;
};

struct InternalCut {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<int> roots;
};

struct Candidate {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<char> mask;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;
    vector<int> root_node;
    int comps = 0;

    DSU(int n, const vector<int>& rep) : parent(n), sz(n, 1), root_node(rep), comps(n) {
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        int r = x;
        while (parent[r] != r) r = parent[r];
        while (parent[x] != x) {
            int p = parent[x];
            parent[x] = r;
            x = p;
        }
        return r;
    }

    int unite(int a, int b, SolverContext& ctx) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return a;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
        root_node[a] = ctx.merge_nodes(root_node[a], root_node[b]);
        --comps;
        return a;
    }
};

static int find_bridge(
    int n,
    const vector<int>& head,
    const vector<int>& to,
    const vector<int>& nxt,
    const vector<int>& arc_eid
) {
    vector<int> tin(n, -1), low(n, 0), parent(n, -1), parent_edge(n, -1), it = head;
    int timer = 0;
    vector<int> st;
    st.reserve(n);

    for (int root = 0; root < n; ++root) {
        if (tin[root] != -1) continue;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int v = st.back();
            if (tin[v] == -1) tin[v] = low[v] = timer++;

            bool descended = false;
            while (it[v] != -1) {
                int arc = it[v];
                it[v] = nxt[arc];
                int u = to[arc];
                if (arc_eid[arc] == parent_edge[v]) continue;
                if (tin[u] == -1) {
                    parent[u] = v;
                    parent_edge[u] = arc_eid[arc];
                    st.push_back(u);
                    descended = true;
                    break;
                }
                low[v] = min(low[v], tin[u]);
            }

            if (descended) continue;

            st.pop_back();
            int p = parent[v];
            if (p != -1) {
                low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                if (low[v] > tin[p]) return parent_edge[v];
            }
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

static GraphState make_base_graph(int n, const shared_ptr<vector<Edge>>& edges) {
    GraphState g;
    g.n = n;
    g.edges = edges;
    g.rep.resize(n);
    iota(g.rep.begin(), g.rep.end(), 0);
    return g;
}

static GraphState contract_to(const GraphState& g, int target, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    target = max(1, min(target, g.n));
    if (target == g.n) return g;

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    DSU dsu(g.n, g.rep);

    while (dsu.comps > target) {
        const Edge& e = edges[(size_t)(rng() % edges.size())];
        int a = dsu.find(e.u);
        int b = dsu.find(e.v);
        if (a == b) continue;
        dsu.unite(a, b, ctx);
    }

    vector<int> root_to_new(g.n, -1);
    vector<int> new_rep;
    new_rep.reserve((size_t)dsu.comps);

    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        int r = dsu.find(v);
        if (root_to_new[r] == -1) {
            root_to_new[r] = (int)new_rep.size();
            new_rep.push_back(dsu.root_node[r]);
        }
    }

    vector<Edge> new_edges;
    new_edges.reserve(edges.size());
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        int a = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.u)];
        int b = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.v)];
        if (a != b) new_edges.push_back(Edge{a, b});
    }

    GraphState h;
    h.n = (int)new_rep.size();
    h.edges = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(new_edges));
    h.rep = std::move(new_rep);
    return h;
}

static InternalCut exact_stoer_wagner(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx) {
    InternalCut result;
    int n = g.n;
    if (n <= 1) {
        result.value = 0;
        if (n == 1) result.roots = {g.rep[0]};
        return result;
    }

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    vector<long long> w((size_t)n * (size_t)n, 0);
    auto W = [&](int a, int b) -> long long& {
        return w[(size_t)a * (size_t)n + (size_t)b];
    };

    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        ++W(e.u, e.v);
        ++W(e.v, e.u);
    }

    vector<int> active(n);
    iota(active.begin(), active.end(), 0);
    vector<int> pos(n);
    iota(pos.begin(), pos.end(), 0);
    vector<int> comp_root = g.rep;
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    vector<char> added(n, 0);

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    int best_root = g.rep[0];

    while (active.size() > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (size_t iter = 0; iter < active.size(); ++iter) {
            int sel = -1;
            long long mx = -1;
            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v] && weight[v] > mx) {
                    mx = weight[v];
                    sel = v;
                }
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            prev = last;
            last = sel;

            if (iter + 1 == active.size()) {
                if (weight[sel] < best) {
                    best = weight[sel];
                    best_root = comp_root[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (int v : active) {
                        if (v == prev || v == sel) continue;
                        W(prev, v) += W(sel, v);
                        W(v, prev) = W(prev, v);
                    }
                    comp_root[prev] = ctx.merge_nodes(comp_root[prev], comp_root[sel]);
                    int idx = pos[sel];
                    int back = active.back();
                    active[idx] = back;
                    pos[back] = idx;
                    active.pop_back();
                }
                break;
            }

            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v]) weight[v] += W(sel, v);
            }
        }
    }

    result.value = best;
    result.roots = {best_root};
    return result;
}

static InternalCut solve_karger_stein(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    static constexpr int BASE_N = 40;
    if (g.n <= BASE_N) return exact_stoer_wagner(g, ctx);

    int target = max(2, (int)ceil((double)g.n / sqrt(2.0)));
    GraphState contracted = contract_to(g, target, ctx, rng);

    InternalCut a = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut b = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    if (a.value <= b.value) return a;
    return b;
}

static Candidate materialize_candidate(const InternalCut& cut, const SolverContext& ctx, int n) {
    Candidate cand;
    cand.value = cut.value;
    cand.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    ctx.mark_roots(cut.roots, cand.mask);
    return cand;
}

static Candidate run_quick_trial(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    GraphState h = contract_to(base, 2, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut cut;
    cut.value = (long long)h.edges->size();
    int root_a = h.rep[0];
    int root_b = h.rep[1];
    int chosen = (ctx.nodes[root_a].size <= ctx.nodes[root_b].size) ? root_a : root_b;
    cut.roots = {chosen};
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static Candidate run_full_attempt(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    InternalCut cut = solve_karger_stein(base, ctx, rng);
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static long long count_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    long long cnt = 0;
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            ++cnt;
        }
    }
    return cnt;
}

static void print_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
        }
    }
}

static int choose_attempts(int n, size_t edge_count, long long best_value) {
    int attempts = 8;
    if (edge_count <= 200000) attempts = 24;
    else if (edge_count <= 1000000) attempts = 16;
    else attempts = 12;

    if (best_value <= 4) attempts = max(attempts, 32);
    else if (best_value <= 8) attempts = max(attempts, 24);
    else if (best_value <= 16) attempts = max(attempts, 20);

    if (n > 500000) attempts = min(attempts, 8);
    else if (n > 100000) attempts = min(attempts, 12);
    return attempts;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n;
    long long m_input;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m_input)) return 0;

    vector<Edge> original_edges;
    original_edges.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, m_input));

    vector<long long> degree(n, 0);
    vector<int> head(n, -1), to, nxt, arc_eid;
    to.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    nxt.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    arc_eid.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));

    auto add_arc = [&](int u, int v, int id) {
        to.push_back(v);
        nxt.push_back(head[u]);
        arc_eid.push_back(id);
        head[u] = (int)to.size() - 1;
    };

    for (long long i = 0; i < m_input; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u == v) continue;
        int id = (int)original_edges.size();
        original_edges.push_back(Edge{u, v});
        ++degree[u];
        ++degree[v];
        add_arc(u, v, id);
        add_arc(v, u, id);
    }

    int m = (int)original_edges.size();
    if (n <= 1 || m == 0) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int bridge_id = find_bridge(n, head, to, nxt, arc_eid);
    if (bridge_id != -1) {
        cout << 1 << '\n';
        cout << original_edges[bridge_id].u << ' ' << original_edges[bridge_id].v << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int vmin = 0;
    long long delta = degree[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < delta) {
            delta = degree[i];
            vmin = i;
        }
    }

    auto original_ptr = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(original_edges));

    vector<long long>().swap(degree);
    vector<int>().swap(head);
    vector<int>().swap(to);
    vector<int>().swap(nxt);
    vector<int>().swap(arc_eid);

    GraphState base = make_base_graph(n, original_ptr);
    if (n <= 800) {
        SolverContext ctx(n);
        InternalCut cut = exact_stoer_wagner(base, ctx);
        Candidate cand = materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
        long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        cout << actual_count << '\n';
        print_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        return 0;
    }

    Candidate best;
    best.value = delta;
    best.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    best.mask[vmin] = 1;

    mt19937_64 rng;
    {
        uint64_t seed = (uint64_t)chrono::high_resolution_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)random_device{}();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)(uintptr_t)&seed;
        rng.seed(seed);
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_quick_trial(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    int attempts = choose_attempts(n, original_ptr->size(), best.value);
    for (int i = 0; i < attempts; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_full_attempt(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    cout << actual_count << '\n';
    print_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    return 0;
}

Subpass 2: 1000 nodes, 8000 edges

Score: 1.00

Details: [1000 nodes, 8000 edges] Cut size: 5, Known min: 12, Time: 2.05s - optimal

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <chrono>
#include <cmath>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <memory>
#include <numeric>
#include <random>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct Edge {
    int u;
    int v;
};

struct TreeNode {
    int left;
    int right;
    int leaf;
    int size;
};

struct SolverContext {
    int original_n = 0;
    vector<TreeNode> nodes;

    explicit SolverContext(int n = 0) : original_n(n) {
        nodes.reserve((size_t)max<long long>(2LL * n + 16, 32LL));
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            nodes.push_back(TreeNode{-1, -1, i, 1});
        }
    }

    int merge_nodes(int a, int b) {
        int id = (int)nodes.size();
        nodes.push_back(TreeNode{a, b, -1, nodes[a].size + nodes[b].size});
        return id;
    }

    void mark_root(int root, vector<char>& mask) const {
        if (root < 0) return;
        vector<int> st;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int x = st.back();
            st.pop_back();
            const TreeNode& nd = nodes[x];
            if (nd.left == -1) {
                mask[nd.leaf] = 1;
            } else {
                st.push_back(nd.left);
                st.push_back(nd.right);
            }
        }
    }

    void mark_roots(const vector<int>& roots, vector<char>& mask) const {
        for (int r : roots) mark_root(r, mask);
    }
};

struct GraphState {
    int n = 0;
    shared_ptr<vector<Edge>> edges;
    vector<int> rep;
};

struct InternalCut {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<int> roots;
};

struct Candidate {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<char> mask;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;
    vector<int> root_node;
    int comps = 0;

    DSU(int n, const vector<int>& rep) : parent(n), sz(n, 1), root_node(rep), comps(n) {
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        int r = x;
        while (parent[r] != r) r = parent[r];
        while (parent[x] != x) {
            int p = parent[x];
            parent[x] = r;
            x = p;
        }
        return r;
    }

    int unite(int a, int b, SolverContext& ctx) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return a;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
        root_node[a] = ctx.merge_nodes(root_node[a], root_node[b]);
        --comps;
        return a;
    }
};

static int find_bridge(
    int n,
    const vector<int>& head,
    const vector<int>& to,
    const vector<int>& nxt,
    const vector<int>& arc_eid
) {
    vector<int> tin(n, -1), low(n, 0), parent(n, -1), parent_edge(n, -1), it = head;
    int timer = 0;
    vector<int> st;
    st.reserve(n);

    for (int root = 0; root < n; ++root) {
        if (tin[root] != -1) continue;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int v = st.back();
            if (tin[v] == -1) tin[v] = low[v] = timer++;

            bool descended = false;
            while (it[v] != -1) {
                int arc = it[v];
                it[v] = nxt[arc];
                int u = to[arc];
                if (arc_eid[arc] == parent_edge[v]) continue;
                if (tin[u] == -1) {
                    parent[u] = v;
                    parent_edge[u] = arc_eid[arc];
                    st.push_back(u);
                    descended = true;
                    break;
                }
                low[v] = min(low[v], tin[u]);
            }

            if (descended) continue;

            st.pop_back();
            int p = parent[v];
            if (p != -1) {
                low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                if (low[v] > tin[p]) return parent_edge[v];
            }
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

static GraphState make_base_graph(int n, const shared_ptr<vector<Edge>>& edges) {
    GraphState g;
    g.n = n;
    g.edges = edges;
    g.rep.resize(n);
    iota(g.rep.begin(), g.rep.end(), 0);
    return g;
}

static GraphState contract_to(const GraphState& g, int target, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    target = max(1, min(target, g.n));
    if (target == g.n) return g;

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    DSU dsu(g.n, g.rep);

    while (dsu.comps > target) {
        const Edge& e = edges[(size_t)(rng() % edges.size())];
        int a = dsu.find(e.u);
        int b = dsu.find(e.v);
        if (a == b) continue;
        dsu.unite(a, b, ctx);
    }

    vector<int> root_to_new(g.n, -1);
    vector<int> new_rep;
    new_rep.reserve((size_t)dsu.comps);

    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        int r = dsu.find(v);
        if (root_to_new[r] == -1) {
            root_to_new[r] = (int)new_rep.size();
            new_rep.push_back(dsu.root_node[r]);
        }
    }

    vector<Edge> new_edges;
    new_edges.reserve(edges.size());
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        int a = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.u)];
        int b = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.v)];
        if (a != b) new_edges.push_back(Edge{a, b});
    }

    GraphState h;
    h.n = (int)new_rep.size();
    h.edges = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(new_edges));
    h.rep = std::move(new_rep);
    return h;
}

static InternalCut exact_stoer_wagner(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx) {
    InternalCut result;
    int n = g.n;
    if (n <= 1) {
        result.value = 0;
        if (n == 1) result.roots = {g.rep[0]};
        return result;
    }

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    vector<long long> w((size_t)n * (size_t)n, 0);
    auto W = [&](int a, int b) -> long long& {
        return w[(size_t)a * (size_t)n + (size_t)b];
    };

    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        ++W(e.u, e.v);
        ++W(e.v, e.u);
    }

    vector<int> active(n);
    iota(active.begin(), active.end(), 0);
    vector<int> pos(n);
    iota(pos.begin(), pos.end(), 0);
    vector<int> comp_root = g.rep;
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    vector<char> added(n, 0);

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    int best_root = g.rep[0];

    while (active.size() > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (size_t iter = 0; iter < active.size(); ++iter) {
            int sel = -1;
            long long mx = -1;
            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v] && weight[v] > mx) {
                    mx = weight[v];
                    sel = v;
                }
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            prev = last;
            last = sel;

            if (iter + 1 == active.size()) {
                if (weight[sel] < best) {
                    best = weight[sel];
                    best_root = comp_root[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (int v : active) {
                        if (v == prev || v == sel) continue;
                        W(prev, v) += W(sel, v);
                        W(v, prev) = W(prev, v);
                    }
                    comp_root[prev] = ctx.merge_nodes(comp_root[prev], comp_root[sel]);
                    int idx = pos[sel];
                    int back = active.back();
                    active[idx] = back;
                    pos[back] = idx;
                    active.pop_back();
                }
                break;
            }

            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v]) weight[v] += W(sel, v);
            }
        }
    }

    result.value = best;
    result.roots = {best_root};
    return result;
}

static InternalCut solve_karger_stein(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    static constexpr int BASE_N = 40;
    if (g.n <= BASE_N) return exact_stoer_wagner(g, ctx);

    int target = max(2, (int)ceil((double)g.n / sqrt(2.0)));
    GraphState contracted = contract_to(g, target, ctx, rng);

    InternalCut a = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut b = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    if (a.value <= b.value) return a;
    return b;
}

static Candidate materialize_candidate(const InternalCut& cut, const SolverContext& ctx, int n) {
    Candidate cand;
    cand.value = cut.value;
    cand.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    ctx.mark_roots(cut.roots, cand.mask);
    return cand;
}

static Candidate run_quick_trial(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    GraphState h = contract_to(base, 2, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut cut;
    cut.value = (long long)h.edges->size();
    int root_a = h.rep[0];
    int root_b = h.rep[1];
    int chosen = (ctx.nodes[root_a].size <= ctx.nodes[root_b].size) ? root_a : root_b;
    cut.roots = {chosen};
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static Candidate run_full_attempt(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    InternalCut cut = solve_karger_stein(base, ctx, rng);
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static long long count_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    long long cnt = 0;
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            ++cnt;
        }
    }
    return cnt;
}

static void print_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
        }
    }
}

static int choose_attempts(int n, size_t edge_count, long long best_value) {
    int attempts = 8;
    if (edge_count <= 200000) attempts = 24;
    else if (edge_count <= 1000000) attempts = 16;
    else attempts = 12;

    if (best_value <= 4) attempts = max(attempts, 32);
    else if (best_value <= 8) attempts = max(attempts, 24);
    else if (best_value <= 16) attempts = max(attempts, 20);

    if (n > 500000) attempts = min(attempts, 8);
    else if (n > 100000) attempts = min(attempts, 12);
    return attempts;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n;
    long long m_input;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m_input)) return 0;

    vector<Edge> original_edges;
    original_edges.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, m_input));

    vector<long long> degree(n, 0);
    vector<int> head(n, -1), to, nxt, arc_eid;
    to.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    nxt.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    arc_eid.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));

    auto add_arc = [&](int u, int v, int id) {
        to.push_back(v);
        nxt.push_back(head[u]);
        arc_eid.push_back(id);
        head[u] = (int)to.size() - 1;
    };

    for (long long i = 0; i < m_input; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u == v) continue;
        int id = (int)original_edges.size();
        original_edges.push_back(Edge{u, v});
        ++degree[u];
        ++degree[v];
        add_arc(u, v, id);
        add_arc(v, u, id);
    }

    int m = (int)original_edges.size();
    if (n <= 1 || m == 0) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int bridge_id = find_bridge(n, head, to, nxt, arc_eid);
    if (bridge_id != -1) {
        cout << 1 << '\n';
        cout << original_edges[bridge_id].u << ' ' << original_edges[bridge_id].v << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int vmin = 0;
    long long delta = degree[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < delta) {
            delta = degree[i];
            vmin = i;
        }
    }

    auto original_ptr = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(original_edges));

    vector<long long>().swap(degree);
    vector<int>().swap(head);
    vector<int>().swap(to);
    vector<int>().swap(nxt);
    vector<int>().swap(arc_eid);

    GraphState base = make_base_graph(n, original_ptr);
    if (n <= 800) {
        SolverContext ctx(n);
        InternalCut cut = exact_stoer_wagner(base, ctx);
        Candidate cand = materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
        long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        cout << actual_count << '\n';
        print_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        return 0;
    }

    Candidate best;
    best.value = delta;
    best.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    best.mask[vmin] = 1;

    mt19937_64 rng;
    {
        uint64_t seed = (uint64_t)chrono::high_resolution_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)random_device{}();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)(uintptr_t)&seed;
        rng.seed(seed);
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_quick_trial(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    int attempts = choose_attempts(n, original_ptr->size(), best.value);
    for (int i = 0; i < attempts; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_full_attempt(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    cout << actual_count << '\n';
    print_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    return 0;
}
Subpass 3
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought
 0.0000
[10000 nodes, 100000 edges] Execution timed out after 30 seconds

Subpass 3: 10000 nodes, 100000 edges

Score: 0.00

Details: [10000 nodes, 100000 edges] Execution timed out after 30 seconds

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <chrono>
#include <cmath>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <memory>
#include <numeric>
#include <random>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct Edge {
    int u;
    int v;
};

struct TreeNode {
    int left;
    int right;
    int leaf;
    int size;
};

struct SolverContext {
    int original_n = 0;
    vector<TreeNode> nodes;

    explicit SolverContext(int n = 0) : original_n(n) {
        nodes.reserve((size_t)max<long long>(2LL * n + 16, 32LL));
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            nodes.push_back(TreeNode{-1, -1, i, 1});
        }
    }

    int merge_nodes(int a, int b) {
        int id = (int)nodes.size();
        nodes.push_back(TreeNode{a, b, -1, nodes[a].size + nodes[b].size});
        return id;
    }

    void mark_root(int root, vector<char>& mask) const {
        if (root < 0) return;
        vector<int> st;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int x = st.back();
            st.pop_back();
            const TreeNode& nd = nodes[x];
            if (nd.left == -1) {
                mask[nd.leaf] = 1;
            } else {
                st.push_back(nd.left);
                st.push_back(nd.right);
            }
        }
    }

    void mark_roots(const vector<int>& roots, vector<char>& mask) const {
        for (int r : roots) mark_root(r, mask);
    }
};

struct GraphState {
    int n = 0;
    shared_ptr<vector<Edge>> edges;
    vector<int> rep;
};

struct InternalCut {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<int> roots;
};

struct Candidate {
    long long value = 0;
    vector<char> mask;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;
    vector<int> root_node;
    int comps = 0;

    DSU(int n, const vector<int>& rep) : parent(n), sz(n, 1), root_node(rep), comps(n) {
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        int r = x;
        while (parent[r] != r) r = parent[r];
        while (parent[x] != x) {
            int p = parent[x];
            parent[x] = r;
            x = p;
        }
        return r;
    }

    int unite(int a, int b, SolverContext& ctx) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return a;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
        root_node[a] = ctx.merge_nodes(root_node[a], root_node[b]);
        --comps;
        return a;
    }
};

static int find_bridge(
    int n,
    const vector<int>& head,
    const vector<int>& to,
    const vector<int>& nxt,
    const vector<int>& arc_eid
) {
    vector<int> tin(n, -1), low(n, 0), parent(n, -1), parent_edge(n, -1), it = head;
    int timer = 0;
    vector<int> st;
    st.reserve(n);

    for (int root = 0; root < n; ++root) {
        if (tin[root] != -1) continue;
        st.push_back(root);
        while (!st.empty()) {
            int v = st.back();
            if (tin[v] == -1) tin[v] = low[v] = timer++;

            bool descended = false;
            while (it[v] != -1) {
                int arc = it[v];
                it[v] = nxt[arc];
                int u = to[arc];
                if (arc_eid[arc] == parent_edge[v]) continue;
                if (tin[u] == -1) {
                    parent[u] = v;
                    parent_edge[u] = arc_eid[arc];
                    st.push_back(u);
                    descended = true;
                    break;
                }
                low[v] = min(low[v], tin[u]);
            }

            if (descended) continue;

            st.pop_back();
            int p = parent[v];
            if (p != -1) {
                low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                if (low[v] > tin[p]) return parent_edge[v];
            }
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

static GraphState make_base_graph(int n, const shared_ptr<vector<Edge>>& edges) {
    GraphState g;
    g.n = n;
    g.edges = edges;
    g.rep.resize(n);
    iota(g.rep.begin(), g.rep.end(), 0);
    return g;
}

static GraphState contract_to(const GraphState& g, int target, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    target = max(1, min(target, g.n));
    if (target == g.n) return g;

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    DSU dsu(g.n, g.rep);

    while (dsu.comps > target) {
        const Edge& e = edges[(size_t)(rng() % edges.size())];
        int a = dsu.find(e.u);
        int b = dsu.find(e.v);
        if (a == b) continue;
        dsu.unite(a, b, ctx);
    }

    vector<int> root_to_new(g.n, -1);
    vector<int> new_rep;
    new_rep.reserve((size_t)dsu.comps);

    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        int r = dsu.find(v);
        if (root_to_new[r] == -1) {
            root_to_new[r] = (int)new_rep.size();
            new_rep.push_back(dsu.root_node[r]);
        }
    }

    vector<Edge> new_edges;
    new_edges.reserve(edges.size());
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        int a = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.u)];
        int b = root_to_new[dsu.find(e.v)];
        if (a != b) new_edges.push_back(Edge{a, b});
    }

    GraphState h;
    h.n = (int)new_rep.size();
    h.edges = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(new_edges));
    h.rep = std::move(new_rep);
    return h;
}

static InternalCut exact_stoer_wagner(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx) {
    InternalCut result;
    int n = g.n;
    if (n <= 1) {
        result.value = 0;
        if (n == 1) result.roots = {g.rep[0]};
        return result;
    }

    const vector<Edge>& edges = *g.edges;
    vector<long long> w((size_t)n * (size_t)n, 0);
    auto W = [&](int a, int b) -> long long& {
        return w[(size_t)a * (size_t)n + (size_t)b];
    };

    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        ++W(e.u, e.v);
        ++W(e.v, e.u);
    }

    vector<int> active(n);
    iota(active.begin(), active.end(), 0);
    vector<int> pos(n);
    iota(pos.begin(), pos.end(), 0);
    vector<int> comp_root = g.rep;
    vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
    vector<char> added(n, 0);

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    int best_root = g.rep[0];

    while (active.size() > 1) {
        fill(weight.begin(), weight.end(), 0);
        fill(added.begin(), added.end(), 0);

        int prev = -1;
        int last = -1;

        for (size_t iter = 0; iter < active.size(); ++iter) {
            int sel = -1;
            long long mx = -1;
            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v] && weight[v] > mx) {
                    mx = weight[v];
                    sel = v;
                }
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            prev = last;
            last = sel;

            if (iter + 1 == active.size()) {
                if (weight[sel] < best) {
                    best = weight[sel];
                    best_root = comp_root[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (int v : active) {
                        if (v == prev || v == sel) continue;
                        W(prev, v) += W(sel, v);
                        W(v, prev) = W(prev, v);
                    }
                    comp_root[prev] = ctx.merge_nodes(comp_root[prev], comp_root[sel]);
                    int idx = pos[sel];
                    int back = active.back();
                    active[idx] = back;
                    pos[back] = idx;
                    active.pop_back();
                }
                break;
            }

            for (int v : active) {
                if (!added[v]) weight[v] += W(sel, v);
            }
        }
    }

    result.value = best;
    result.roots = {best_root};
    return result;
}

static InternalCut solve_karger_stein(const GraphState& g, SolverContext& ctx, mt19937_64& rng) {
    static constexpr int BASE_N = 40;
    if (g.n <= BASE_N) return exact_stoer_wagner(g, ctx);

    int target = max(2, (int)ceil((double)g.n / sqrt(2.0)));
    GraphState contracted = contract_to(g, target, ctx, rng);

    InternalCut a = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut b = solve_karger_stein(contracted, ctx, rng);
    if (a.value <= b.value) return a;
    return b;
}

static Candidate materialize_candidate(const InternalCut& cut, const SolverContext& ctx, int n) {
    Candidate cand;
    cand.value = cut.value;
    cand.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    ctx.mark_roots(cut.roots, cand.mask);
    return cand;
}

static Candidate run_quick_trial(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    GraphState h = contract_to(base, 2, ctx, rng);
    InternalCut cut;
    cut.value = (long long)h.edges->size();
    int root_a = h.rep[0];
    int root_b = h.rep[1];
    int chosen = (ctx.nodes[root_a].size <= ctx.nodes[root_b].size) ? root_a : root_b;
    cut.roots = {chosen};
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static Candidate run_full_attempt(const GraphState& base, int n, mt19937_64& rng) {
    SolverContext ctx(n);
    InternalCut cut = solve_karger_stein(base, ctx, rng);
    return materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
}

static long long count_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    long long cnt = 0;
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            ++cnt;
        }
    }
    return cnt;
}

static void print_cut_edges(const vector<char>& mask, const vector<Edge>& edges) {
    for (const Edge& e : edges) {
        if (mask[e.u] != mask[e.v]) {
            cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
        }
    }
}

static int choose_attempts(int n, size_t edge_count, long long best_value) {
    int attempts = 8;
    if (edge_count <= 200000) attempts = 24;
    else if (edge_count <= 1000000) attempts = 16;
    else attempts = 12;

    if (best_value <= 4) attempts = max(attempts, 32);
    else if (best_value <= 8) attempts = max(attempts, 24);
    else if (best_value <= 16) attempts = max(attempts, 20);

    if (n > 500000) attempts = min(attempts, 8);
    else if (n > 100000) attempts = min(attempts, 12);
    return attempts;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n;
    long long m_input;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m_input)) return 0;

    vector<Edge> original_edges;
    original_edges.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, m_input));

    vector<long long> degree(n, 0);
    vector<int> head(n, -1), to, nxt, arc_eid;
    to.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    nxt.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));
    arc_eid.reserve((size_t)max(0LL, 2LL * m_input));

    auto add_arc = [&](int u, int v, int id) {
        to.push_back(v);
        nxt.push_back(head[u]);
        arc_eid.push_back(id);
        head[u] = (int)to.size() - 1;
    };

    for (long long i = 0; i < m_input; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u == v) continue;
        int id = (int)original_edges.size();
        original_edges.push_back(Edge{u, v});
        ++degree[u];
        ++degree[v];
        add_arc(u, v, id);
        add_arc(v, u, id);
    }

    int m = (int)original_edges.size();
    if (n <= 1 || m == 0) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int bridge_id = find_bridge(n, head, to, nxt, arc_eid);
    if (bridge_id != -1) {
        cout << 1 << '\n';
        cout << original_edges[bridge_id].u << ' ' << original_edges[bridge_id].v << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    int vmin = 0;
    long long delta = degree[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < delta) {
            delta = degree[i];
            vmin = i;
        }
    }

    auto original_ptr = make_shared<vector<Edge>>(std::move(original_edges));

    vector<long long>().swap(degree);
    vector<int>().swap(head);
    vector<int>().swap(to);
    vector<int>().swap(nxt);
    vector<int>().swap(arc_eid);

    GraphState base = make_base_graph(n, original_ptr);
    if (n <= 800) {
        SolverContext ctx(n);
        InternalCut cut = exact_stoer_wagner(base, ctx);
        Candidate cand = materialize_candidate(cut, ctx, n);
        long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        cout << actual_count << '\n';
        print_cut_edges(cand.mask, *original_ptr);
        return 0;
    }

    Candidate best;
    best.value = delta;
    best.mask.assign((size_t)n, 0);
    best.mask[vmin] = 1;

    mt19937_64 rng;
    {
        uint64_t seed = (uint64_t)chrono::high_resolution_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)random_device{}();
        seed ^= (uint64_t)(uintptr_t)&seed;
        rng.seed(seed);
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_quick_trial(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    int attempts = choose_attempts(n, original_ptr->size(), best.value);
    for (int i = 0; i < attempts; ++i) {
        Candidate cand = run_full_attempt(base, n, rng);
        if (cand.value < best.value) best = std::move(cand);
    }

    long long actual_count = count_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    cout << actual_count << '\n';
    print_cut_edges(best.mask, *original_ptr);
    return 0;
}

Subpass 8

Test 19: 3D Voxel Mining (C#) Score: 0.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a C# program to solve a mining problem in a simplified 3D voxel space.

**Constraints:**
1. Can only dig dirt that is exposed from above or a side.
2. Dug dirt must be dumped somewhere - at a location not blocking future digging
3. Maximum uphill slope - 1 Z voxel per X/Y voxel.
4. Dumped dirt becomes a new obstacle (plan carefully!)
5. Goal is to get valuable ore to a processing plant located at x=0, y=0
6. Ground is stable and solid, and you can dig under any voxel without fear of it collapsing
so long as it's connected to the earth. If you disconnect a voxel(s), it will collapse.

The voxel grid size has 10x more precision in Z than X/Y. So 10x10x100 is a cube.

**Input header format (stdin - space delimited. Ends with newline):**
```
XVoxelCount YVoxelCount ZVoxelCount XBlockSize YBlockSize ZBlockSize
```
Counts are human readable integers. BlockSize are human readable decimal numbers.

After the newline, voxels then follow in bytes, like this python psuedocode:
```
for x in range(XVoxelCount):
for y in range(YVoxelCount):
for z in range(ZVoxelCount):
d = readByte(stdin)
massInTonnes = d % 16
valuePerTonne = d // 16
addVoxel(d)
```

Each peice of dirt needs to be moved to its new location - you need to trace the
path in X and Y (4-connected / manhatten steps) and ensure that the path doesn't climb uphill
or downhill more than 1 Z voxel for every X/Y voxel.

**Output format (stdout / newline seperated):**
```
M (number of operations)
N digX digY digZ stepX1 stepY1 stepX2 stepY2 (N steps) destX destY (for each operation)
```

If dumping valuable ore at the processing plant, the voxel ceases to exist. If a voxel is
dumped elsewhere, it is dumped on top of the ground, raising the ground by 1 voxel. It can
be dug again and moved later if required.

Every unit of mass requires $1 of fuel to move one voxel in X or Y when flat, or $5 of fuel
to go up a 10% slope. Downhill is free.

Getting valuable ore to your processing plant pays $1000 per unit of mass per unit of value.
The most valuable ore (#15) pays $15,000 per ton, so the most a single dump truck load can gross
is $225,000.

(Dumping junk ore at the processing plant causes damage to the plant, costing $1000 per ton.)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. World size could be anything from 10x10x10 to 5000x5000x5000, your code should handle both extremes.
4. Your code should complete in under 5 minutes
5. Maximize profit.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14


Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
