[200K vertices (~60M edges)] Answered Clique size 610 (true: 610), 6.69s

Maximum Clique - 200K vertices (~60M edges)

View C# Code (29335 chars)
using System;
using System.Buffers;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;

public static class Program
{
    private const int ExactThreshold = 3000;
    private const int SeedLimit = 64;
    private const int PairBranchLimit = 3;
    private const int TimeLimitMs = 280000;

    private static int N;
    private static int[] Offsets = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] Adj = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] DegreeGlobal = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] DegreeOf = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] CoreOf = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] SubMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] WorkMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] ExactMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] IndexMap = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] BfsMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] QueueBuffer = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int SubStamp = 1;
    private static int WorkStamp = 1;
    private static int ExactStamp = 1;
    private static int BfsStamp = 1;
    private static Stopwatch Clock = new Stopwatch();
    private static bool TimedOut;
    private static int BestSize;
    private static int[] BestClique = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] CurrentClique = Array.Empty<int>();

    public static void Main()
    {
        var fs = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        N = fs.NextInt();
        int m = fs.NextInt();

        var writer = new StreamWriter(Console.OpenStandardOutput()) { AutoFlush = false };
        if (N <= 0)
        {
            writer.WriteLine(0);
            writer.WriteLine();
            writer.Flush();
            return;
        }

        int[] us = new int[m];
        int[] vs = new int[m];
        int valid = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
        {
            int u = fs.NextInt();
            int v = fs.NextInt();
            us[i] = u;
            vs[i] = v;
            if (u != v) valid++;
        }

        if (valid == 0)
        {
            writer.WriteLine(1);
            writer.WriteLine(0);
            writer.Flush();
            return;
        }

        DegreeGlobal = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
        {
            int u = us[i];
            int v = vs[i];
            if (u == v) continue;
            DegreeGlobal[u]++;
            DegreeGlobal[v]++;
        }

        Offsets = new int[N + 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) Offsets[i + 1] = Offsets[i] + DegreeGlobal[i];
        Adj = new int[Offsets[N]];
        int[] cur = new int[N];
        Array.Copy(Offsets, cur, N);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
        {
            int u = us[i];
            int v = vs[i];
            if (u == v) continue;
            Adj[cur[u]++] = v;
            Adj[cur[v]++] = u;
        }

        SubMark = new int[N];
        WorkMark = new int[N];
        ExactMark = new int[N];
        IndexMap = new int[N];
        BfsMark = new int[N];
        QueueBuffer = new int[N];
        DegreeOf = new int[N];
        CoreOf = new int[N];
        BestClique = new int[N];
        CurrentClique = new int[N];
        BestSize = 1;
        BestClique[0] = 0;

        Clock.Start();
        ProcessGraph();

        Array.Sort(BestClique, 0, BestSize);
        writer.WriteLine(BestSize);
        for (int i = 0; i < BestSize; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) writer.Write(' ');
            writer.Write(BestClique[i]);
        }
        writer.WriteLine();
        writer.Flush();
    }

    private static void ProcessGraph()
    {
        int visitStamp = ++BfsStamp;
        for (int start = 0; start < N && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; start++)
        {
            if (BfsMark[start] == visitStamp) continue;
            if (DegreeGlobal[start] == 0) continue;
            if (Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                break;
            }

            int qh = 0, qt = 0;
            BfsMark[start] = visitStamp;
            QueueBuffer[qt++] = start;
            int maxDegree = DegreeGlobal[start];
            List<int> comp = new List<int>(16);

            while (qh < qt)
            {
                int v = QueueBuffer[qh++];
                comp.Add(v);
                if (DegreeGlobal[v] > maxDegree) maxDegree = DegreeGlobal[v];

                for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Adj[e];
                    if (BfsMark[u] == visitStamp) continue;
                    BfsMark[u] = visitStamp;
                    QueueBuffer[qt++] = u;
                }
            }

            if (comp.Count <= BestSize) continue;
            if (maxDegree < BestSize) continue;
            SolveSubgraph(comp.ToArray());
        }
    }

    private static void SolveSubgraph(int[] vertices)
    {
        if (TimedOut || Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
        {
            TimedOut = true;
            return;
        }

        int size = vertices.Length;
        if (size <= BestSize) return;
        if (size <= ExactThreshold)
        {
            SolveExact(vertices, Array.Empty<int>());
            return;
        }

        int subStamp = ++SubStamp;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            SubMark[v] = subStamp;
        }

        int[] degWork = new int[size];
        int[] pos = new int[size];
        int[] vert = new int[size];
        int[] coreLocal = new int[size];
        int maxDeg = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            IndexMap[v] = i;
            int d = 0;
            for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
            {
                int u = Adj[e];
                if (SubMark[u] == subStamp) d++;
            }
            degWork[i] = d;
            DegreeOf[v] = d;
            if (d > maxDeg) maxDeg = d;
        }

        if (maxDeg < BestSize) return;

        int[] bin = new int[maxDeg + 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) bin[degWork[i]]++;
        int start = 0;
        for (int d = 0; d <= maxDeg; d++)
        {
            int c = bin[d];
            bin[d] = start;
            start += c;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int d = degWork[i];
            int p = bin[d]++;
            pos[i] = p;
            vert[p] = i;
        }
        for (int d = maxDeg; d >= 1; d--) bin[d] = bin[d - 1];
        bin[0] = 0;

        int maxCore = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int vLocal = vert[i];
            int dv = degWork[vLocal];
            coreLocal[vLocal] = dv;
            if (dv > maxCore) maxCore = dv;

            int gv = vertices[vLocal];
            for (int e = Offsets[gv]; e < Offsets[gv + 1]; e++)
            {
                int u = Adj[e];
                if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
                int uLocal = IndexMap[u];
                if (degWork[uLocal] <= dv) continue;

                int du = degWork[uLocal];
                int pu = pos[uLocal];
                int pw = bin[du];
                int wLocal = vert[pw];
                if (uLocal != wLocal)
                {
                    vert[pw] = uLocal;
                    vert[pu] = wLocal;
                    pos[uLocal] = pw;
                    pos[wLocal] = pu;
                }
                bin[du]++;
                degWork[uLocal]--;
            }
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            CoreOf[v] = coreLocal[i];
            if (coreLocal[i] > maxCore) maxCore = coreLocal[i];
        }

        if (maxCore < BestSize) return;

        int before = BestSize;
        HeuristicSolve(vertices, subStamp);
        if (TimedOut) return;
        if (BestSize > before)
        {
            HeuristicSolve(vertices, subStamp);
            if (TimedOut) return;
        }

        if (BestSize >= size || BestSize == N) return;

        int threshold = BestSize;
        int activeCount = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            if (CoreOf[vertices[i]] >= threshold) activeCount++;
        }

        if (activeCount <= BestSize) return;
        if (activeCount == size) return;

        if (activeCount <= ExactThreshold)
        {
            int[] active = new int[activeCount];
            int idx = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
            {
                int v = vertices[i];
                if (CoreOf[v] >= threshold) active[idx++] = v;
            }
            SolveExact(active, Array.Empty<int>());
            return;
        }

        int[] activeVerts = new int[activeCount];
        int idx2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            if (CoreOf[v] >= threshold) activeVerts[idx2++] = v;
        }

        int activeStamp = ++SubStamp;
        for (int i = 0; i < activeCount; i++) SubMark[activeVerts[i]] = activeStamp;

        int visitStamp = ++BfsStamp;
        int[] compBuffer = new int[activeCount];
        for (int i = 0; i < activeCount && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; i++)
        {
            int startV = activeVerts[i];
            if (BfsMark[startV] == visitStamp) continue;

            int qh = 0, qt = 0, compCount = 0;
            QueueBuffer[qt++] = startV;
            BfsMark[startV] = visitStamp;

            while (qh < qt)
            {
                int v = QueueBuffer[qh++];
                compBuffer[compCount++] = v;
                for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Adj[e];
                    if (SubMark[u] != activeStamp) continue;
                    if (BfsMark[u] == visitStamp) continue;
                    BfsMark[u] = visitStamp;
                    QueueBuffer[qt++] = u;
                }
            }

            if (compCount <= BestSize) continue;
            int[] component = new int[compCount];
            Array.Copy(compBuffer, component, compCount);
            SolveSubgraph(component);
        }
    }

    private static void HeuristicSolve(int[] vertices, int subStamp)
    {
        if (TimedOut || Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
        {
            TimedOut = true;
            return;
        }

        int[] seeds = SelectTopSeeds(vertices);
        for (int i = 0; i < seeds.Length && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; i++)
        {
            int seed = seeds[i];
            if (CoreOf[seed] < BestSize) break;
            EvaluateSeed(seed, subStamp);
            if (Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                return;
            }
        }
    }

    private static void EvaluateSeed(int seed, int subStamp)
    {
        int threshold = BestSize;
        if (CoreOf[seed] < threshold) return;

        int[] candidates = BuildNeighborList(seed, subStamp, threshold);
        int upperBound = candidates.Length + 1;
        if (upperBound <= BestSize) return;

        int[] greedy = GreedyExtend(new[] { seed }, candidates);
        TryUpdateBest(greedy, greedy.Length);
        if (TimedOut || BestSize == N) return;

        if (candidates.Length + 1 <= BestSize) return;

        if (candidates.Length + 1 <= ExactThreshold)
        {
            int[] subset = new int[candidates.Length + 1];
            subset[0] = seed;
            Array.Copy(candidates, 0, subset, 1, candidates.Length);
            SolveExact(subset, new[] { seed });
            return;
        }

        int seedStamp = ++WorkStamp;
        for (int e = Offsets[seed]; e < Offsets[seed + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (SubMark[u] == subStamp && CoreOf[u] >= BestSize)
                WorkMark[u] = seedStamp;
        }

        int[] top = SelectTopFromList(candidates, PairBranchLimit);
        for (int i = 0; i < top.Length && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; i++)
        {
            int t = top[i];
            if (CoreOf[t] < BestSize) continue;

            int[] common = BuildCommonNeighborList(seed, t, subStamp, seedStamp);
            if (common.Length + 2 <= BestSize) continue;

            if (common.Length + 2 <= ExactThreshold)
            {
                int[] subset = new int[common.Length + 2];
                subset[0] = seed;
                subset[1] = t;
                Array.Copy(common, 0, subset, 2, common.Length);
                SolveExact(subset, new[] { seed, t });
            }
            else
            {
                int[] greedyPair = GreedyExtend(new[] { seed, t }, common);
                TryUpdateBest(greedyPair, greedyPair.Length);
            }
        }
    }

    private static int[] BuildNeighborList(int seed, int subStamp, int threshold)
    {
        int stamp = ++WorkStamp;
        int count = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[seed]; e < Offsets[seed + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < threshold) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] == stamp) continue;
            WorkMark[u] = stamp;
            count++;
        }

        if (count == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();

        int[] list = new int[count];
        int idx = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[seed]; e < Offsets[seed + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < threshold) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] != stamp) continue;
            list[idx++] = u;
            WorkMark[u] = -stamp;
        }
        return list;
    }

    private static int[] BuildCommonNeighborList(int seed, int other, int subStamp, int seedStamp)
    {
        int stamp = ++ExactStamp;
        int count = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[other]; e < Offsets[other + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (u == seed || u == other) continue;
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < BestSize) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] != seedStamp) continue;
            if (ExactMark[u] == stamp) continue;
            ExactMark[u] = stamp;
            count++;
        }

        if (count == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();

        int[] list = new int[count];
        int idx = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[other]; e < Offsets[other + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (u == seed || u == other) continue;
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < BestSize) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] != seedStamp) continue;
            if (ExactMark[u] != stamp) continue;
            list[idx++] = u;
            ExactMark[u] = -stamp;
        }
        return list;
    }

    private static int[] GreedyExtend(int[] forced, int[] candidates)
    {
        int forcedCount = forced.Length;
        int candidateCount = candidates.Length;
        int[] clique = new int[forcedCount + candidateCount];
        Array.Copy(forced, clique, forcedCount);
        int cliqueCount = forcedCount;

        if (candidateCount == 0)
        {
            int[] result = new int[cliqueCount];
            Array.Copy(clique, result, cliqueCount);
            return result;
        }

        int[] current = new int[candidateCount];
        int[] next = new int[candidateCount];
        Array.Copy(candidates, current, candidateCount);
        int remaining = candidateCount;
        int iter = 0;

        while (remaining > 0)
        {
            if ((iter++ & 63) == 0 && Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                break;
            }

            int bestIdx = 0;
            long bestScore = Score(current[0]);
            for (int i = 1; i < remaining; i++)
            {
                long s = Score(current[i]);
                if (s > bestScore)
                {
                    bestScore = s;
                    bestIdx = i;
                }
            }

            int v = current[bestIdx];
            clique[cliqueCount++] = v;

            int stamp = ++WorkStamp;
            for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                WorkMark[Adj[e]] = stamp;

            int newCount = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < remaining; i++)
            {
                int u = current[i];
                if (u == v) continue;
                if (WorkMark[u] == stamp)
                    next[newCount++] = u;
            }

            var tmp = current;
            current = next;
            next = tmp;
            remaining = newCount;
        }

        int[] result2 = new int[cliqueCount];
        Array.Copy(clique, result2, cliqueCount);
        return result2;
    }

    private static int[] SelectTopSeeds(int[] vertices)
    {
        int limit = Math.Min(SeedLimit, vertices.Length);
        int filled = 0;
        int[] bestVertices = new int[limit];
        long[] bestScores = new long[limit];

        for (int i = 0; i < vertices.Length; i++)
        {
            if (Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                break;
            }

            int v = vertices[i];
            if (CoreOf[v] < BestSize) continue;

            long score = Score(v);
            if (filled < limit)
            {
                bestVertices[filled] = v;
                bestScores[filled] = score;
                int j = filled;
                filled++;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
            else if (score > bestScores[filled - 1])
            {
                bestVertices[filled - 1] = v;
                bestScores[filled - 1] = score;
                int j = filled - 1;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
        }

        if (filled == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();
        int[] result = new int[filled];
        Array.Copy(bestVertices, result, filled);
        return result;
    }

    private static int[] SelectTopFromList(int[] list, int limit)
    {
        int k = Math.Min(limit, list.Length);
        int filled = 0;
        int[] bestVertices = new int[k];
        long[] bestScores = new long[k];

        for (int i = 0; i < list.Length; i++)
        {
            int v = list[i];
            long score = Score(v);
            if (filled < k)
            {
                bestVertices[filled] = v;
                bestScores[filled] = score;
                int j = filled;
                filled++;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
            else if (score > bestScores[filled - 1])
            {
                bestVertices[filled - 1] = v;
                bestScores[filled - 1] = score;
                int j = filled - 1;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
        }

        if (filled == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();
        int[] result = new int[filled];
        Array.Copy(bestVertices, result, filled);
        return result;
    }

    private static long Score(int v)
    {
        return ((long)CoreOf[v] << 32) | (uint)DegreeOf[v];
    }

    private static void SolveExact(int[] subset, int[] forced)
    {
        if (TimedOut || Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
        {
            TimedOut = true;
            return;
        }

        int count = subset.Length;
        if (count <= BestSize) return;

        using var ctx = new ExactContext(subset, forced);
        ctx.Run();
    }

    private static void TryUpdateBest(int[] clique, int count)
    {
        if (count <= BestSize) return;
        BestSize = count;
        Array.Copy(clique, BestClique, count);
    }

    private static int CountBits(ulong[] bits, int wordCount)
    {
        int count = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < wordCount; i++) count += BitOperations.PopCount(bits[i]);
        return count;
    }

    private static int FirstSetBit(ulong[] bits, int wordCount)
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < wordCount; i++)
        {
            ulong w = bits[i];
            if (w != 0) return (i << 6) + BitOperations.TrailingZeroCount(w);
        }
        return -1;
    }

    private static void ClearBit(ulong[] bits, int index)
    {
        bits[index >> 6] &= ~(1UL << (index & 63));
    }

    private sealed class ExactContext : IDisposable
    {
        private readonly int[] _subset;
        private readonly int[] _forced;
        private readonly int _forcedCount;
        private readonly int _count;
        private readonly int _wordCount;
        private readonly ulong[] _matrix;
        private readonly ulong[] _p;
        private readonly ulong[] _rem;
        private readonly ulong[] _q;
        private bool _disposed;

        public ExactContext(int[] subset, int[] forced)
        {
            _subset = subset;
            _forced = forced;
            _forcedCount = forced.Length;
            _count = subset.Length;
            _wordCount = (_count + 63) >> 6;

            _matrix = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_count * _wordCount);
            _p = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);
            _rem = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);
            _q = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);

            BuildMatrix();
        }

        private void BuildMatrix()
        {
            int stamp = ++Program.ExactStamp;
            int[] deg = new int[_count];

            for (int i = 0; i < _count; i++)
            {
                int v = _subset[i];
                Program.ExactMark[v] = stamp;
                int d = 0;
                for (int e = Program.Offsets[v]; e < Program.Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Program.Adj[e];
                    if (Program.ExactMark[u] == stamp) d++;
                }
                deg[i] = d;
            }

            Array.Sort(deg, _subset);
            Array.Reverse(deg);
            Array.Reverse(_subset);

            for (int i = 0; i < _count; i++)
                Program.IndexMap[_subset[i]] = i;

            Array.Clear(_matrix, 0, _count * _wordCount);
            for (int i = 0; i < _count; i++)
            {
                int v = _subset[i];
                int row = i * _wordCount;
                for (int e = Program.Offsets[v]; e < Program.Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Program.Adj[e];
                    if (Program.ExactMark[u] != stamp) continue;
                    int j = Program.IndexMap[u];
                    _matrix[row + (j >> 6)] |= 1UL << (j & 63);
                }
            }
        }

        public void Run()
        {
            if (_count <= Program.BestSize) return;

            Array.Clear(_p, 0, _wordCount);
            for (int i = 0; i < _wordCount; i++) _p[i] = ulong.MaxValue;
            int extra = (_wordCount << 6) - _count;
            if (extra > 0) _p[_wordCount - 1] = ulong.MaxValue >> extra;

            for (int i = 0; i < _forcedCount; i++)
                Program.CurrentClique[i] = _forced[i];

            for (int i = 0; i < _forcedCount; i++)
            {
                int local = Program.IndexMap[_forced[i]];
                Program.ClearBit(_p, local);
            }

            Search(_p, _forcedCount);
        }

        private void Search(ulong[] p, int size)
        {
            if (Program.TimedOut || Program.Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                Program.TimedOut = true;
                return;
            }

            int candidateCount = CountBits(p, _wordCount);
            if (size + candidateCount <= Program.BestSize) return;

            if (candidateCount == 0)
            {
                if (size > Program.BestSize)
                    Program.TryUpdateBest(Program.CurrentClique, size);
                return;
            }

            int[] order = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(candidateCount);
            int[] colors = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(candidateCount);
            try
            {
                int count = ColorSort(p, order, colors);
                for (int i = count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
                {
                    if (size + colors[i] <= Program.BestSize) break;
                    int v = order[i];
                    Program.CurrentClique[size] = _subset[v];

                    ulong[] child = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);
                    try
                    {
                        Intersect(p, v, child);
                        Search(child, size + 1);
                    }
                    finally
                    {
                        ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(child, false);
                    }

                    if (Program.TimedOut) return;
                    Program.ClearBit(p, v);
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(order, false);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(colors, false);
            }
        }

        private int ColorSort(ulong[] p, int[] order, int[] colors)
        {
            Array.Copy(p, _rem, _wordCount);
            int count = 0;
            int color = 0;
            int remaining = CountBits(p, _wordCount);

            while (remaining > 0)
            {
                color++;
                Array.Copy(_rem, _q, _wordCount);

                while (true)
                {
                    int v = Program.FirstSetBit(_q, _wordCount);
                    if (v < 0) break;

                    order[count] = v;
                    colors[count] = color;
                    count++;
                    remaining--;

                    Program.ClearBit(_rem, v);
                    Program.ClearBit(_q, v);
                    int row = v * _wordCount;
                    for (int w = 0; w < _wordCount; w++)
                        _q[w] &= ~_matrix[row + w];
                }
            }

            return count;
        }

        private void Intersect(ulong[] p, int localVertex, ulong[] dest)
        {
            int row = localVertex * _wordCount;
            for (int i = 0; i < _wordCount; i++)
                dest[i] = p[i] & _matrix[row + i];
        }

        public void Dispose()
        {
            if (_disposed) return;
            _disposed = true;
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_matrix, false);
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_p, false);
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_rem, false);
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_q, false);
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream _stream;
        private readonly byte[] _buffer;
        private int _len;
        private int _ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            _stream = stream;
            _buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
        }

        private byte Read()
        {
            if (_ptr >= _len)
            {
                _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
                _ptr = 0;
                if (_len <= 0) return 0;
            }
            return _buffer[_ptr++];
        }

        public int NextInt()
        {
            byte c;
            do
            {
                c = Read();
                if (c == 0) return 0;
            } while (c <= 32);

            int sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = Read();
            }

            int value = 0;
            while (c > 32 && c != 0)
            {
                value = value * 10 + (c - '0');
                c = Read();
            }
            return value * sign;
        }
    }
}
Subpass 17
Subpass configurationView exact prompt

[500K vertices (~125M edges, >1GB)] Answered Clique size 510 (true: 510), 25.07s

Maximum Clique - 500K vertices (~125M edges, >1GB)

View C# Code (29335 chars)
using System;
using System.Buffers;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;

public static class Program
{
    private const int ExactThreshold = 3000;
    private const int SeedLimit = 64;
    private const int PairBranchLimit = 3;
    private const int TimeLimitMs = 280000;

    private static int N;
    private static int[] Offsets = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] Adj = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] DegreeGlobal = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] DegreeOf = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] CoreOf = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] SubMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] WorkMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] ExactMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] IndexMap = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] BfsMark = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] QueueBuffer = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int SubStamp = 1;
    private static int WorkStamp = 1;
    private static int ExactStamp = 1;
    private static int BfsStamp = 1;
    private static Stopwatch Clock = new Stopwatch();
    private static bool TimedOut;
    private static int BestSize;
    private static int[] BestClique = Array.Empty<int>();
    private static int[] CurrentClique = Array.Empty<int>();

    public static void Main()
    {
        var fs = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        N = fs.NextInt();
        int m = fs.NextInt();

        var writer = new StreamWriter(Console.OpenStandardOutput()) { AutoFlush = false };
        if (N <= 0)
        {
            writer.WriteLine(0);
            writer.WriteLine();
            writer.Flush();
            return;
        }

        int[] us = new int[m];
        int[] vs = new int[m];
        int valid = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
        {
            int u = fs.NextInt();
            int v = fs.NextInt();
            us[i] = u;
            vs[i] = v;
            if (u != v) valid++;
        }

        if (valid == 0)
        {
            writer.WriteLine(1);
            writer.WriteLine(0);
            writer.Flush();
            return;
        }

        DegreeGlobal = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
        {
            int u = us[i];
            int v = vs[i];
            if (u == v) continue;
            DegreeGlobal[u]++;
            DegreeGlobal[v]++;
        }

        Offsets = new int[N + 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) Offsets[i + 1] = Offsets[i] + DegreeGlobal[i];
        Adj = new int[Offsets[N]];
        int[] cur = new int[N];
        Array.Copy(Offsets, cur, N);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
        {
            int u = us[i];
            int v = vs[i];
            if (u == v) continue;
            Adj[cur[u]++] = v;
            Adj[cur[v]++] = u;
        }

        SubMark = new int[N];
        WorkMark = new int[N];
        ExactMark = new int[N];
        IndexMap = new int[N];
        BfsMark = new int[N];
        QueueBuffer = new int[N];
        DegreeOf = new int[N];
        CoreOf = new int[N];
        BestClique = new int[N];
        CurrentClique = new int[N];
        BestSize = 1;
        BestClique[0] = 0;

        Clock.Start();
        ProcessGraph();

        Array.Sort(BestClique, 0, BestSize);
        writer.WriteLine(BestSize);
        for (int i = 0; i < BestSize; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) writer.Write(' ');
            writer.Write(BestClique[i]);
        }
        writer.WriteLine();
        writer.Flush();
    }

    private static void ProcessGraph()
    {
        int visitStamp = ++BfsStamp;
        for (int start = 0; start < N && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; start++)
        {
            if (BfsMark[start] == visitStamp) continue;
            if (DegreeGlobal[start] == 0) continue;
            if (Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                break;
            }

            int qh = 0, qt = 0;
            BfsMark[start] = visitStamp;
            QueueBuffer[qt++] = start;
            int maxDegree = DegreeGlobal[start];
            List<int> comp = new List<int>(16);

            while (qh < qt)
            {
                int v = QueueBuffer[qh++];
                comp.Add(v);
                if (DegreeGlobal[v] > maxDegree) maxDegree = DegreeGlobal[v];

                for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Adj[e];
                    if (BfsMark[u] == visitStamp) continue;
                    BfsMark[u] = visitStamp;
                    QueueBuffer[qt++] = u;
                }
            }

            if (comp.Count <= BestSize) continue;
            if (maxDegree < BestSize) continue;
            SolveSubgraph(comp.ToArray());
        }
    }

    private static void SolveSubgraph(int[] vertices)
    {
        if (TimedOut || Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
        {
            TimedOut = true;
            return;
        }

        int size = vertices.Length;
        if (size <= BestSize) return;
        if (size <= ExactThreshold)
        {
            SolveExact(vertices, Array.Empty<int>());
            return;
        }

        int subStamp = ++SubStamp;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            SubMark[v] = subStamp;
        }

        int[] degWork = new int[size];
        int[] pos = new int[size];
        int[] vert = new int[size];
        int[] coreLocal = new int[size];
        int maxDeg = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            IndexMap[v] = i;
            int d = 0;
            for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
            {
                int u = Adj[e];
                if (SubMark[u] == subStamp) d++;
            }
            degWork[i] = d;
            DegreeOf[v] = d;
            if (d > maxDeg) maxDeg = d;
        }

        if (maxDeg < BestSize) return;

        int[] bin = new int[maxDeg + 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) bin[degWork[i]]++;
        int start = 0;
        for (int d = 0; d <= maxDeg; d++)
        {
            int c = bin[d];
            bin[d] = start;
            start += c;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int d = degWork[i];
            int p = bin[d]++;
            pos[i] = p;
            vert[p] = i;
        }
        for (int d = maxDeg; d >= 1; d--) bin[d] = bin[d - 1];
        bin[0] = 0;

        int maxCore = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int vLocal = vert[i];
            int dv = degWork[vLocal];
            coreLocal[vLocal] = dv;
            if (dv > maxCore) maxCore = dv;

            int gv = vertices[vLocal];
            for (int e = Offsets[gv]; e < Offsets[gv + 1]; e++)
            {
                int u = Adj[e];
                if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
                int uLocal = IndexMap[u];
                if (degWork[uLocal] <= dv) continue;

                int du = degWork[uLocal];
                int pu = pos[uLocal];
                int pw = bin[du];
                int wLocal = vert[pw];
                if (uLocal != wLocal)
                {
                    vert[pw] = uLocal;
                    vert[pu] = wLocal;
                    pos[uLocal] = pw;
                    pos[wLocal] = pu;
                }
                bin[du]++;
                degWork[uLocal]--;
            }
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            CoreOf[v] = coreLocal[i];
            if (coreLocal[i] > maxCore) maxCore = coreLocal[i];
        }

        if (maxCore < BestSize) return;

        int before = BestSize;
        HeuristicSolve(vertices, subStamp);
        if (TimedOut) return;
        if (BestSize > before)
        {
            HeuristicSolve(vertices, subStamp);
            if (TimedOut) return;
        }

        if (BestSize >= size || BestSize == N) return;

        int threshold = BestSize;
        int activeCount = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            if (CoreOf[vertices[i]] >= threshold) activeCount++;
        }

        if (activeCount <= BestSize) return;
        if (activeCount == size) return;

        if (activeCount <= ExactThreshold)
        {
            int[] active = new int[activeCount];
            int idx = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
            {
                int v = vertices[i];
                if (CoreOf[v] >= threshold) active[idx++] = v;
            }
            SolveExact(active, Array.Empty<int>());
            return;
        }

        int[] activeVerts = new int[activeCount];
        int idx2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        {
            int v = vertices[i];
            if (CoreOf[v] >= threshold) activeVerts[idx2++] = v;
        }

        int activeStamp = ++SubStamp;
        for (int i = 0; i < activeCount; i++) SubMark[activeVerts[i]] = activeStamp;

        int visitStamp = ++BfsStamp;
        int[] compBuffer = new int[activeCount];
        for (int i = 0; i < activeCount && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; i++)
        {
            int startV = activeVerts[i];
            if (BfsMark[startV] == visitStamp) continue;

            int qh = 0, qt = 0, compCount = 0;
            QueueBuffer[qt++] = startV;
            BfsMark[startV] = visitStamp;

            while (qh < qt)
            {
                int v = QueueBuffer[qh++];
                compBuffer[compCount++] = v;
                for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Adj[e];
                    if (SubMark[u] != activeStamp) continue;
                    if (BfsMark[u] == visitStamp) continue;
                    BfsMark[u] = visitStamp;
                    QueueBuffer[qt++] = u;
                }
            }

            if (compCount <= BestSize) continue;
            int[] component = new int[compCount];
            Array.Copy(compBuffer, component, compCount);
            SolveSubgraph(component);
        }
    }

    private static void HeuristicSolve(int[] vertices, int subStamp)
    {
        if (TimedOut || Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
        {
            TimedOut = true;
            return;
        }

        int[] seeds = SelectTopSeeds(vertices);
        for (int i = 0; i < seeds.Length && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; i++)
        {
            int seed = seeds[i];
            if (CoreOf[seed] < BestSize) break;
            EvaluateSeed(seed, subStamp);
            if (Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                return;
            }
        }
    }

    private static void EvaluateSeed(int seed, int subStamp)
    {
        int threshold = BestSize;
        if (CoreOf[seed] < threshold) return;

        int[] candidates = BuildNeighborList(seed, subStamp, threshold);
        int upperBound = candidates.Length + 1;
        if (upperBound <= BestSize) return;

        int[] greedy = GreedyExtend(new[] { seed }, candidates);
        TryUpdateBest(greedy, greedy.Length);
        if (TimedOut || BestSize == N) return;

        if (candidates.Length + 1 <= BestSize) return;

        if (candidates.Length + 1 <= ExactThreshold)
        {
            int[] subset = new int[candidates.Length + 1];
            subset[0] = seed;
            Array.Copy(candidates, 0, subset, 1, candidates.Length);
            SolveExact(subset, new[] { seed });
            return;
        }

        int seedStamp = ++WorkStamp;
        for (int e = Offsets[seed]; e < Offsets[seed + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (SubMark[u] == subStamp && CoreOf[u] >= BestSize)
                WorkMark[u] = seedStamp;
        }

        int[] top = SelectTopFromList(candidates, PairBranchLimit);
        for (int i = 0; i < top.Length && !TimedOut && BestSize < N; i++)
        {
            int t = top[i];
            if (CoreOf[t] < BestSize) continue;

            int[] common = BuildCommonNeighborList(seed, t, subStamp, seedStamp);
            if (common.Length + 2 <= BestSize) continue;

            if (common.Length + 2 <= ExactThreshold)
            {
                int[] subset = new int[common.Length + 2];
                subset[0] = seed;
                subset[1] = t;
                Array.Copy(common, 0, subset, 2, common.Length);
                SolveExact(subset, new[] { seed, t });
            }
            else
            {
                int[] greedyPair = GreedyExtend(new[] { seed, t }, common);
                TryUpdateBest(greedyPair, greedyPair.Length);
            }
        }
    }

    private static int[] BuildNeighborList(int seed, int subStamp, int threshold)
    {
        int stamp = ++WorkStamp;
        int count = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[seed]; e < Offsets[seed + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < threshold) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] == stamp) continue;
            WorkMark[u] = stamp;
            count++;
        }

        if (count == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();

        int[] list = new int[count];
        int idx = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[seed]; e < Offsets[seed + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < threshold) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] != stamp) continue;
            list[idx++] = u;
            WorkMark[u] = -stamp;
        }
        return list;
    }

    private static int[] BuildCommonNeighborList(int seed, int other, int subStamp, int seedStamp)
    {
        int stamp = ++ExactStamp;
        int count = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[other]; e < Offsets[other + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (u == seed || u == other) continue;
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < BestSize) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] != seedStamp) continue;
            if (ExactMark[u] == stamp) continue;
            ExactMark[u] = stamp;
            count++;
        }

        if (count == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();

        int[] list = new int[count];
        int idx = 0;
        for (int e = Offsets[other]; e < Offsets[other + 1]; e++)
        {
            int u = Adj[e];
            if (u == seed || u == other) continue;
            if (SubMark[u] != subStamp) continue;
            if (CoreOf[u] < BestSize) continue;
            if (WorkMark[u] != seedStamp) continue;
            if (ExactMark[u] != stamp) continue;
            list[idx++] = u;
            ExactMark[u] = -stamp;
        }
        return list;
    }

    private static int[] GreedyExtend(int[] forced, int[] candidates)
    {
        int forcedCount = forced.Length;
        int candidateCount = candidates.Length;
        int[] clique = new int[forcedCount + candidateCount];
        Array.Copy(forced, clique, forcedCount);
        int cliqueCount = forcedCount;

        if (candidateCount == 0)
        {
            int[] result = new int[cliqueCount];
            Array.Copy(clique, result, cliqueCount);
            return result;
        }

        int[] current = new int[candidateCount];
        int[] next = new int[candidateCount];
        Array.Copy(candidates, current, candidateCount);
        int remaining = candidateCount;
        int iter = 0;

        while (remaining > 0)
        {
            if ((iter++ & 63) == 0 && Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                break;
            }

            int bestIdx = 0;
            long bestScore = Score(current[0]);
            for (int i = 1; i < remaining; i++)
            {
                long s = Score(current[i]);
                if (s > bestScore)
                {
                    bestScore = s;
                    bestIdx = i;
                }
            }

            int v = current[bestIdx];
            clique[cliqueCount++] = v;

            int stamp = ++WorkStamp;
            for (int e = Offsets[v]; e < Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                WorkMark[Adj[e]] = stamp;

            int newCount = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < remaining; i++)
            {
                int u = current[i];
                if (u == v) continue;
                if (WorkMark[u] == stamp)
                    next[newCount++] = u;
            }

            var tmp = current;
            current = next;
            next = tmp;
            remaining = newCount;
        }

        int[] result2 = new int[cliqueCount];
        Array.Copy(clique, result2, cliqueCount);
        return result2;
    }

    private static int[] SelectTopSeeds(int[] vertices)
    {
        int limit = Math.Min(SeedLimit, vertices.Length);
        int filled = 0;
        int[] bestVertices = new int[limit];
        long[] bestScores = new long[limit];

        for (int i = 0; i < vertices.Length; i++)
        {
            if (Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                TimedOut = true;
                break;
            }

            int v = vertices[i];
            if (CoreOf[v] < BestSize) continue;

            long score = Score(v);
            if (filled < limit)
            {
                bestVertices[filled] = v;
                bestScores[filled] = score;
                int j = filled;
                filled++;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
            else if (score > bestScores[filled - 1])
            {
                bestVertices[filled - 1] = v;
                bestScores[filled - 1] = score;
                int j = filled - 1;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
        }

        if (filled == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();
        int[] result = new int[filled];
        Array.Copy(bestVertices, result, filled);
        return result;
    }

    private static int[] SelectTopFromList(int[] list, int limit)
    {
        int k = Math.Min(limit, list.Length);
        int filled = 0;
        int[] bestVertices = new int[k];
        long[] bestScores = new long[k];

        for (int i = 0; i < list.Length; i++)
        {
            int v = list[i];
            long score = Score(v);
            if (filled < k)
            {
                bestVertices[filled] = v;
                bestScores[filled] = score;
                int j = filled;
                filled++;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
            else if (score > bestScores[filled - 1])
            {
                bestVertices[filled - 1] = v;
                bestScores[filled - 1] = score;
                int j = filled - 1;
                while (j > 0 && bestScores[j] > bestScores[j - 1])
                {
                    long ts = bestScores[j];
                    bestScores[j] = bestScores[j - 1];
                    bestScores[j - 1] = ts;
                    int tv = bestVertices[j];
                    bestVertices[j] = bestVertices[j - 1];
                    bestVertices[j - 1] = tv;
                    j--;
                }
            }
        }

        if (filled == 0) return Array.Empty<int>();
        int[] result = new int[filled];
        Array.Copy(bestVertices, result, filled);
        return result;
    }

    private static long Score(int v)
    {
        return ((long)CoreOf[v] << 32) | (uint)DegreeOf[v];
    }

    private static void SolveExact(int[] subset, int[] forced)
    {
        if (TimedOut || Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
        {
            TimedOut = true;
            return;
        }

        int count = subset.Length;
        if (count <= BestSize) return;

        using var ctx = new ExactContext(subset, forced);
        ctx.Run();
    }

    private static void TryUpdateBest(int[] clique, int count)
    {
        if (count <= BestSize) return;
        BestSize = count;
        Array.Copy(clique, BestClique, count);
    }

    private static int CountBits(ulong[] bits, int wordCount)
    {
        int count = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < wordCount; i++) count += BitOperations.PopCount(bits[i]);
        return count;
    }

    private static int FirstSetBit(ulong[] bits, int wordCount)
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < wordCount; i++)
        {
            ulong w = bits[i];
            if (w != 0) return (i << 6) + BitOperations.TrailingZeroCount(w);
        }
        return -1;
    }

    private static void ClearBit(ulong[] bits, int index)
    {
        bits[index >> 6] &= ~(1UL << (index & 63));
    }

    private sealed class ExactContext : IDisposable
    {
        private readonly int[] _subset;
        private readonly int[] _forced;
        private readonly int _forcedCount;
        private readonly int _count;
        private readonly int _wordCount;
        private readonly ulong[] _matrix;
        private readonly ulong[] _p;
        private readonly ulong[] _rem;
        private readonly ulong[] _q;
        private bool _disposed;

        public ExactContext(int[] subset, int[] forced)
        {
            _subset = subset;
            _forced = forced;
            _forcedCount = forced.Length;
            _count = subset.Length;
            _wordCount = (_count + 63) >> 6;

            _matrix = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_count * _wordCount);
            _p = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);
            _rem = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);
            _q = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);

            BuildMatrix();
        }

        private void BuildMatrix()
        {
            int stamp = ++Program.ExactStamp;
            int[] deg = new int[_count];

            for (int i = 0; i < _count; i++)
            {
                int v = _subset[i];
                Program.ExactMark[v] = stamp;
                int d = 0;
                for (int e = Program.Offsets[v]; e < Program.Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Program.Adj[e];
                    if (Program.ExactMark[u] == stamp) d++;
                }
                deg[i] = d;
            }

            Array.Sort(deg, _subset);
            Array.Reverse(deg);
            Array.Reverse(_subset);

            for (int i = 0; i < _count; i++)
                Program.IndexMap[_subset[i]] = i;

            Array.Clear(_matrix, 0, _count * _wordCount);
            for (int i = 0; i < _count; i++)
            {
                int v = _subset[i];
                int row = i * _wordCount;
                for (int e = Program.Offsets[v]; e < Program.Offsets[v + 1]; e++)
                {
                    int u = Program.Adj[e];
                    if (Program.ExactMark[u] != stamp) continue;
                    int j = Program.IndexMap[u];
                    _matrix[row + (j >> 6)] |= 1UL << (j & 63);
                }
            }
        }

        public void Run()
        {
            if (_count <= Program.BestSize) return;

            Array.Clear(_p, 0, _wordCount);
            for (int i = 0; i < _wordCount; i++) _p[i] = ulong.MaxValue;
            int extra = (_wordCount << 6) - _count;
            if (extra > 0) _p[_wordCount - 1] = ulong.MaxValue >> extra;

            for (int i = 0; i < _forcedCount; i++)
                Program.CurrentClique[i] = _forced[i];

            for (int i = 0; i < _forcedCount; i++)
            {
                int local = Program.IndexMap[_forced[i]];
                Program.ClearBit(_p, local);
            }

            Search(_p, _forcedCount);
        }

        private void Search(ulong[] p, int size)
        {
            if (Program.TimedOut || Program.Clock.ElapsedMilliseconds > TimeLimitMs)
            {
                Program.TimedOut = true;
                return;
            }

            int candidateCount = CountBits(p, _wordCount);
            if (size + candidateCount <= Program.BestSize) return;

            if (candidateCount == 0)
            {
                if (size > Program.BestSize)
                    Program.TryUpdateBest(Program.CurrentClique, size);
                return;
            }

            int[] order = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(candidateCount);
            int[] colors = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(candidateCount);
            try
            {
                int count = ColorSort(p, order, colors);
                for (int i = count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
                {
                    if (size + colors[i] <= Program.BestSize) break;
                    int v = order[i];
                    Program.CurrentClique[size] = _subset[v];

                    ulong[] child = ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Rent(_wordCount);
                    try
                    {
                        Intersect(p, v, child);
                        Search(child, size + 1);
                    }
                    finally
                    {
                        ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(child, false);
                    }

                    if (Program.TimedOut) return;
                    Program.ClearBit(p, v);
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(order, false);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(colors, false);
            }
        }

        private int ColorSort(ulong[] p, int[] order, int[] colors)
        {
            Array.Copy(p, _rem, _wordCount);
            int count = 0;
            int color = 0;
            int remaining = CountBits(p, _wordCount);

            while (remaining > 0)
            {
                color++;
                Array.Copy(_rem, _q, _wordCount);

                while (true)
                {
                    int v = Program.FirstSetBit(_q, _wordCount);
                    if (v < 0) break;

                    order[count] = v;
                    colors[count] = color;
                    count++;
                    remaining--;

                    Program.ClearBit(_rem, v);
                    Program.ClearBit(_q, v);
                    int row = v * _wordCount;
                    for (int w = 0; w < _wordCount; w++)
                        _q[w] &= ~_matrix[row + w];
                }
            }

            return count;
        }

        private void Intersect(ulong[] p, int localVertex, ulong[] dest)
        {
            int row = localVertex * _wordCount;
            for (int i = 0; i < _wordCount; i++)
                dest[i] = p[i] & _matrix[row + i];
        }

        public void Dispose()
        {
            if (_disposed) return;
            _disposed = true;
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_matrix, false);
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_p, false);
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_rem, false);
            ArrayPool<ulong>.Shared.Return(_q, false);
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream _stream;
        private readonly byte[] _buffer;
        private int _len;
        private int _ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            _stream = stream;
            _buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
        }

        private byte Read()
        {
            if (_ptr >= _len)
            {
                _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
                _ptr = 0;
                if (_len <= 0) return 0;
            }
            return _buffer[_ptr++];
        }

        public int NextInt()
        {
            byte c;
            do
            {
                c = Read();
                if (c == 0) return 0;
            } while (c <= 32);

            int sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = Read();
            }

            int value = 0;
            while (c > 32 && c != 0)
            {
                value = value * 10 + (c - '0');
                c = Read();
            }
            return value * sign;
        }
    }
}
Test 30: 3-SAT Solver (Python) Score: 0.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Python code to solve the 3-SAT (Boolean Satisfiability) problem, which is NP-Complete.

**What is 3-SAT?**
You have N boolean variables (x1, x2, ..., xN), each of which is either True or False.
You are given M "clauses". Each clause is a constraint containing exactly 3 "literals".
A literal is either:
- A positive integer (e.g. 5) meaning "variable 5 must be True", or
- A negative integer (e.g. -5) meaning "variable 5 must be False".

A clause is **satisfied** if ANY of its 3 literals evaluates to True.
The formula is **satisfiable** if ALL clauses can be satisfied simultaneously
by some assignment of True/False to the variables.

**Example:**
Variables: x1, x2, x3
Clause "1 -2 3" means: x1=True OR x2=False OR x3=True.
If x1=True, x2=True, x3=False → clause satisfied (x1=True is enough).

Your task: find an assignment of True/False to every variable that satisfies
every clause. All test instances are guaranteed to be satisfiable.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_variables num_clauses
lit1 lit2 lit3
lit1 lit2 lit3
...
```
Variables are 1-indexed. Negative literals mean negation.

**Output format (stdout):**
```
SAT
v1 v2 v3 ... vN
```
Where each vi is 1 (True) or 0 (False) for variable i, space-separated.

**Grading:**
- Output "SAT" on the first line, then the assignment on the second line.
- Every clause must be satisfied by your assignment.
- Timeouts, crashes, wrong format, or unsatisfied clauses all score 0.

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Handle up to 20M variables and 85M clauses.
3. Complete within 5 minutes.

Write complete, runnable Python code.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

This is the classic 3-SAT problem, one of the first problems proven to be NP-complete. Every test instance has a hidden satisfying assignment the AI must discover. Subpasses increase the number of variables and clauses.

Test 31: Subset Sum (Rust) Score: 0.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the Subset Sum problem.

Your Rust subset sum solver will be tested with instances ranging from simple to very
complex sets. The same algorithm must work efficiently across ALL problem complexities.

Given a set of integers and a target value, determine if there exists a subset
that sums to exactly the target value. Simple sets (<100 numbers) you can probably
brute force, however this code will also need to run on sets with millions of
numbers. This is NP-Complete and requires sophisticated algorithms for larger instances:
additionally; threading, memory optimization, vectorization and parallelization are all
strongly suggested.

**Input format (stdin, space seperated decimal integers):**
```
num_numbers target
num1 num2 ... numN
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
YES or NO
[index1 index2 ... indexK] (only if YES, 0-indexed indices of subset elements)
```

**Implementation Hints:**
- Detect set complexity and choose appropriate algorithm
- Use efficient data structures: bitsets, hash sets for DP
- Implement adaptive quality vs speed tradeoffs
- For very large sets, focus on approximation algorithms
- Handle edge cases: empty set, zero target, all numbers add to target.
- Use fast I/O as the input size can approach 1gb.

**Success Criteria:**
- Correctly determine if subset sum exists
- If YES, provide valid subset indices
- Complete within time limit

**Failure Criteria:**
- Incorrect subset sum determination
- Invalid subset indices
- Timeout without conclusion

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with rustc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable set sizes and target values
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying subset sum complexities efficiently

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Be aware that default warnings are enabled and will cause a compilation failure,
so ensure that you write warning-free code.

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

This is a classic NP-hard problem. The test uses planted instances with a known solution for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the list size and target magnitude.

Test 32: Steiner Tree (C++) Score: 0.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve the Steiner Tree problem (NP-Hard).

**Problem:**
Given a weighted undirected graph and a set of terminal vertices, find a minimum-weight
tree that connects all terminals. The tree may include non-terminal (Steiner) vertices.

**Input (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges num_terminals
u v weight (one edge per line, 0-indexed)
terminal_1 terminal_2 ... terminal_K
```

**Output (stdout):**
```
total_weight edge_count
u1 v1
u2 v2
...
```
Edges listed must form a connected, acyclic subgraph that includes all terminals.


**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

**Hints (not required):**
- Exact DP (Dreyfus-Wagner) for small terminal sets.
- MST / shortest-path heuristics for large graphs.
- Use adjacency lists and fast I/O.

Connect a set of important nodes in a weighted graph using the cheapest possible tree of edges. Unlike a minimum spanning tree, the solution may pass through intermediate nodes that aren’t in the required set if doing so saves cost — like building a road network that connects key cities via junctions.

This is NP-hard. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal tree for strict grading. Subpasses increase the graph size.

Test 33: Quadratic Assignment Problem (C#) Score: 0.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to solve the Quadratic Assignment Problem (QAP), which is NP-hard.

**Problem:**
You have N facilities and N locations. You must assign each facility to exactly one
location (a permutation). The cost of assigning facility i to location p[i] is:

sum over all pairs (i, j): flow[i][j] * distance[p[i]][p[j]]

Your goal is to minimize this total cost.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
N
flow[0][0] flow[0][1] ... flow[0][N-1]
...
flow[N-1][0] ... flow[N-1][N-1]
dist[0][0] dist[0][1] ... dist[0][N-1]
...
dist[N-1][0] ... dist[N-1][N-1]
```
All values are integers. Matrices are N×N. Indices are 0-based in the output.

**Output format (stdout):**
```
total_cost
p0 p1 p2 ... p(N-1)
```
Where p is a permutation of 0..N-1 and p[i] is the location assigned to facility i.

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Output a valid permutation.
3. Handle N from very small up to ~2000 within 5 minutes.
4. Heuristics are acceptable for large N; lower cost scores higher.

Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method. Assume only the standard library.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Assign N facilities to N locations so that the total cost is minimised, where cost depends on how much material flows between each pair of facilities multiplied by the distance between their assigned locations. Think of arranging departments in an office to minimise how far people walk between them.

This is the Quadratic Assignment Problem, one of the hardest combinatorial optimisation problems. The test uses planted instances with a known optimum for strict grading. Subpasses increase the problem size.

Test 34: Vehicle Routing Problem (Python) Score: 0.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Python code to solve the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP).

**Problem:**
You have a depot and N customers with coordinates and demands. You must create up to K vehicle
routes starting and ending at the depot. Each customer must be visited exactly once and the sum
of demands on any route must not exceed the vehicle capacity. Minimize total travel distance.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
N K CAPACITY
depot_x depot_y
x1 y1 demand1
x2 y2 demand2
...
xN yN demandN
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
total_distance
num_routes
route_1
route_2
...
```
Each route line should list customer indices (0-based) in visit order.

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Output valid routes that cover all customers exactly once.
3. Respect vehicle capacity on every route.
4. Heuristics are acceptable for large instances; shorter distance scores higher.

Write complete, runnable Python code.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Plan delivery routes for a fleet of vehicles so that every customer is visited and the total distance travelled is minimised. Each vehicle has a capacity limit, so the AI must decide which customers go on which truck and in what order.

This is the Vehicle Routing Problem, a generalisation of the Travelling Salesman Problem. Subpasses increase the number of customers and vehicles. The baseline uses a simple nearest-neighbour heuristic.

Test 35: Minimum Dominating Set (Rust) Score: 0.00 / 21
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the Minimum Dominating Set problem (NP-hard).

**Problem:**
Given an undirected graph, find a small set of vertices S such that every vertex is
either in S or adjacent to at least one vertex in S. Smaller sets score better.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges
u1 v1
u2 v2
...
```
Vertices are 0-indexed.

**Output format (stdout):**
```
set_size
v1 v2 v3 ...
```
Where the second line lists the vertices in the dominating set (0-indexed).

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Output a valid dominating set.
3. Heuristics are acceptable for large graphs; smaller sets score higher.
4. Must run within 5 minutes.

**Target environment specs**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler information**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Test 36: Maximum Independent Set (C++) Score: 0.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve the **Maximum Independent Set** problem.

Given an undirected graph, find the largest set of vertices such that no two chosen vertices share an edge.

The evaluator is strict: only an exact maximum independent set is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
u v
u v
... (m lines total)
```
- `n` = number of vertices (0-indexed: 0..n-1)
- `m` = number of undirected edges
- each edge appears as two integers `u v`

**Output format (stdout)**
```
k
v1 v2 v3 ... vk
```
- `k` = size of your independent set
- second line lists exactly `k` distinct vertex indices (space-separated)
- vertices may be printed in any order

**What will be checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Every printed vertex is in range.
3. No edge exists between any two printed vertices.
4. `k` is the true maximum for the input graph.

**Requirements**
1. Use standard C++ (C++17-compatible).
2. Read from stdin and write to stdout.
3. Handle small and very large graphs.
4. Finish within the test timeout.

**Environment**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Write complete, compilable C++ code with `main()`.
 Prompt Changes:

Subpass 0

View chain of thought

Find the largest group of nodes in a graph such that no two nodes in the group are connected by an edge. Think of seating people at a dinner party where certain pairs don’t get along — seat as many guests as possible with no feuding neighbours at the same table.

This is NP-hard. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal answer for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the graph size.

Test 37: Feedback Vertex Set (C#) Score: 0.00 / 14
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to solve the **Directed Feedback Vertex Set** problem.

Given a directed graph, find the smallest set of vertices to remove so the remaining graph has **no directed cycles** (i.e., it becomes a DAG).

The evaluator is strict: only a minimum-size valid feedback vertex set is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
u v
u v
... (m lines total)
```
- `n`: number of vertices (0-indexed: `0..n-1`)
- `m`: number of directed edges
- each line `u v` means an edge `u -> v`

**Output format (stdout)**
```
k
v1 v2 v3 ... vk
```
- `k`: number of removed vertices
- second line: exactly `k` distinct vertex indices (any order)

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Vertex indices are valid and distinct.
3. Removing those vertices makes the graph acyclic.
4. The set size is minimum.

**Requirements**
1. Provide complete C# code with `Main`.
2. Read from stdin and write to stdout.
3. Handle small and very large graphs.
4. Finish within the test timeout.

**Environment**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler**

Find the smallest set of nodes to remove from a directed graph so that no cycles remain. Think of breaking deadlocks in a dependency chain — remove as few tasks as possible so that the rest can be completed in a straight order.

This is NP-hard. The test uses planted instances where a known small set of nodes creates all the cycles, enabling strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the graph size.

Test 38: Exact Cover (Python) Score: 0.00 / 16
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Python code to solve the **Exact Cover** problem.

Given a universe of elements and a list of sets, choose set indices such that:
1) every element is covered, and
2) no element is covered more than once.

The evaluator is strict: only the exact expected solution is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
U S
e1 e2 e3 ...
e1 e2 ...
... (S lines total)
```
- `U` = number of elements in the universe (elements are `0..U-1`)
- `S` = number of available sets
- each following line is one set, listed as space-separated element IDs

**Output format (stdout)**
```
SOLUTION
i1 i2 i3 ... ik
```
or
```
NO SOLUTION
```

- `i1..ik` are 0-based set indices into the input list.

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Indices are valid and distinct.
3. Chosen indices are exactly the planted exact-cover solution.

Write complete Python code that reads stdin and writes stdout.

View chain of thought

Given a collection of sets, choose some of them so that every element in the universe appears in exactly one chosen set — no gaps and no overlaps. Think of tiling a floor with pre-cut pieces where every tile must be used exactly once and every square must be covered.

This is a classic NP-complete problem. Each test instance has exactly one valid solution, so grading is strict pass/fail. Subpasses increase the universe and set sizes.

Test 39: Graph Bisection (Rust) Score: 0.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the **Graph Bisection** problem.

Given an undirected graph with an even number of vertices, split the vertices into two equal-size parts to minimize cut edges (edges with endpoints in different parts).

The evaluator is strict: only a minimum-cut valid bisection is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
u v
u v
... (m lines total)
```
- `n` vertices labeled `0..n-1` (n is even)
- `m` undirected edges

**Output format (stdout)**
```
cut_size
v1 v2 v3 ... v(n/2)
```
- first line: reported cut size
- second line: vertices in partition A (exactly n/2 distinct indices)
- partition B is all remaining vertices

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Partition size is exactly `n/2` and vertices are valid/distinct.
3. Reported cut matches the actual cut.
4. The cut is minimum for the instance.

Split a graph’s nodes into two equally-sized groups so that as few edges as possible cross between the groups. Think of dividing a school into two teams where friends want to stay together — minimise the number of friendships that get split.

The test uses planted graphs that can be perfectly bisected with zero crossing edges, so grading is strict pass/fail. Subpasses increase the graph size.

Test 40: Integer Linear Programming (C++) Score: 0.00 / 14
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve a **0/1 Integer Linear Program**.

Maximize:
sum(c_i * x_i)

Subject to:
x_u + x_v <= 1 (for each constraint pair u, v)
x_i in {0, 1}

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
c_0 c_1 ... c_(n-1)
u_0 v_0
u_1 v_1
... (m lines total)
```
- `n` = number of binary variables
- `m` = number of pair constraints

**Output format (stdout)**
```
objective_value
x_0 x_1 ... x_(n-1)
```

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. `x_i` are binary and satisfy all constraints.
3. Reported objective matches the assignment.
4. Assignment achieves the true optimum for the instance.

Maximise a score by choosing which items to switch “on” or “off”, subject to a set of rules that restrict certain combinations. Each item has a value, and the rules say things like “you can’t pick both A and B”.

This is 0/1 Integer Linear Programming, a fundamental NP-hard optimisation problem. The test uses planted instances with a known unique optimum for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the number of variables and constraints.

Test 41: Fragment Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly text fragment shader. The shader will be assembled
with spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0 target) and rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader):**
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos; ; world-space position
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal; ; world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv; ; texture coordinates in [0,1]
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent; ; tangent vector
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color; ; per-vertex color (smoothly varies: typical value: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
```

**Available uniform buffer (DescriptorSet 0, Binding 0):**
```
struct UBO { // std140 layout
mat4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
mat4 view; // offset 64
mat4 projection; // offset 128
vec4 lightPos; // offset 192 -- typical value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
vec4 cameraPos; // offset 208 -- typical value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
vec4 params; // offset 224 -- typical value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```
layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor; RGBA float, will be stored as rgba8unorm
```

**SPIR-V requirements:**
- Start with `; SPIR-V` header comment and version
- Use `OpCapability Shader` and `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- Use `OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main"` listing ALL input/output variables used
- Use `OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft`
- Declare all necessary decorations (Location, DescriptorSet, Binding, Block, Offsets)
- All input variables are `Input` storage class, output is `Output` storage class
- The uniform buffer variable is `Uniform` storage class
- Entry point function name must be "main"

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the SPIR-V text.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (vec4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
